mātaram pitaram ca api mārayāmāsa tad viṣāt bhogaiḥ ca jāte dravya vyaye tatas brāhmaṇānām gṛhe coryam cakāra saḥ tadā khalaḥ surā pāna mada unmattaḥ tadā jñāti bahiṣkṛtaḥ sarvaiḥ tadā abhūt śrīmat devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe adhyāyaḥ muktāvalyā tayā sārdham jagāma gahanam vanam mārge sthitaḥ dravya lobhāt jaghāna brāhmaṇān bahūn netum tam yama dūtāḥ ca samājagmuḥ sahasraśas śiva lokāt śiva gaṇāḥ tathā eva ca samāgatāḥ hiva dūtāḥ tadā procuḥ ayam yasmin sthale mṛtaḥ daśa hastāt adhas bhūmyām rudrākṣaḥ tatra ca asti hi tad prabhāvena he dūtāḥ neṣyāmaḥ śiva saṃnidhim gataḥ guṇanidhiḥ dṛtaiḥ sahitaḥ śaṃkara ālayam iti rudrākṣa māhātmyam kathitam te suvrataiḥ evam rudrākṣa mahimā samāsāt kathitaḥ mayā iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca evam nārada ṣaḍvaktraḥ giriśeṇa vivodhitaḥ rudrākṣa mahimānam ca jñātvā āsīt saḥ kṛtārthakaḥ itthaṃbhūta anubhāvaḥ ayam rudrākṣaḥ varṇitaḥ mayā sat ācāra prasaṅgeṇa śṛṇu ca anyat samāhitaḥ yathā rudrākṣa mahimā varṇitaḥ ananta puṇya daḥ lakṣaṇam mantra vinyāsam tathā aham varṇayāmi te lakṣam tu darśanāt puṇyam koṭiḥ tad sparśanāt bhavet tasya koṭi guṇam puṇyam labhate dhāraṇāt naraḥ koṭi sahasrāṇi lakṣa koṭi śatāni ca tad japāt labhate puṇyam naraḥ rudrākṣa dhāraṇāt rudrākṣāṇām tu bhadrākṣa dhāraṇāt syāt mahā phalam dhātrī phala pramāṇam yat śreṣṭam etat udāhṛtam adhamam caṇa mātram syāt pratijñā īṣā mayā uditā brāhmaṇāḥ kṣatriyāḥ vaiśyāḥ śūdrāḥ śra iti śiva ājñayā vṛkṣāt jātāḥ pṛthivyām tu tad jātīyāḥ śubhākṣakā śvetāḥ tu brāhmaṇāḥ jñeyāḥ kṣatriyāḥ rakta varṇakāḥ pītāḥ vaiśyāḥ tu vijñeyāḥ kṛṣṇāḥ śūdrāḥ prakīrtitāḥ brāhmaṇaḥ bibhṛyāt śvetān ratta atra ajā tu dhārayet pītān vaiśyaḥ tu bibhṛyāt kṛṣṇān śūdraḥ tu dhārayet samāḥ snigdhāḥ dṛḍhāḥ tad dṛś kaṇṭakaiḥ saṃyutāḥ śubhāḥ kṛmi daṣṭān śinna bhinnān kaṇṭakaiḥ rahitān tathā vraṇa yuktān āvṛtān ca parudrākṣān tu varjayet svayam eva kṛta dvāraḥ rudrākṣaḥ syāt iha uttamaḥ samān snigdhān dṛḍhān vṛttān kṣauma sūtreṇa dhārayet sarva gātreṣu sāmyena samānā ati vilakṣaṇā nigharṣe hema lekhā ābhā yatra lekhā pradṛśyate tat akṣam uttamam vidyāt saḥ dhāryaḥ śiva pūjakaiḥ śikhāyām eka rudrākṣam śirasā vahet ṭtriṃśat ca gale dhāryāḥ bāhuvoḥ poḍaśa poḍaśa maṇibandhe dvādaśa akṣān makaṃdhe pañcāśatam bhavet taiḥ aṣṭottaraśataiḥ mālopavītam ca prakalpayet dvi saram tri saram vā api bibhṛyāt kaṇṭha deśāt tuṇḍale mukuṭe ca eva kaṇikā hārakeṣu ca mupte pīte sarvakālam rudrākṣam dhārayet naraḥ triśatam tu amam pañcaśatam madhyamam ucyate śirasi īśāna mantreṇa karṇe tatpuruṣeṇa ca pañcāśat akṣa grathitām vāmadevena ca udare pañca brahmabhiḥ aṅgaiḥ vā api evam rudrākṣa dhāraṇam prathitān mūlamantreṇa sarvān akṣān tu dhārayet prakāśanam para tattva dhāraṇāt ca dhāraṇāt ardhanārīśaḥ prīyate tasya nityaśas trivaktraḥ tu analaḥ sākṣāt strī hatyām dahati kṣaṇāt caturmukhaḥ tu rudrākṣaḥ pitāmahaḥ eva rūpakaḥ tad dhāraṇāt mahā śrīmān mahat ārogyam uttamam rudrākṣaḥ pañca brahma svarūpakaḥ mahatī jñāna saṃpattiḥ śuddhaye dhārayet naraḥ tu tasya dhāraṇa mātreṇa saṃtuṣyati maheśvaraḥ ṣaḍvaktraḥ ca eva rudrākṣaḥ kārttikeya adhidaivataḥ yam ca api devam pravadanti manīṣiṇaḥ saptavaktraḥ tu rudrākṣaḥ tad dhāraṇāt mahā aśroḥ syāt mahat ārogyam uttamam sapta aśva daivataḥ ca eva rudrākṣaḥ api aṣṭa mātra adhidaivataḥ mahatī jñāna saṃpattiḥ śuciḥ ve dhārayet naraḥ tu tad dhāraṇāt ime prītāḥ bhaveyuḥ satya vādinaḥ daśavaktraḥ tu rudrākṣaḥ daśa āśā davataḥ smṛtaḥ rudra ekādaśa daivataḥ ekādaśa mukhaḥ tu akṣaḥ rudra akṣaḥ dvādaśa mukhaḥ mahāviṣṇu svarūpakaḥ yad devaḥ prasīdati trayodaśa mukha śva akṣaḥ kāma daḥ siddhi daḥ śubhaḥ tasya dhāraṇa mātreṇa pradāyakaḥ madyam māṃsam ca laśunam palāṇḍum śigrum eva ca śleṣmātakam viḍvarāham bhakṣaṇe varjayet tatas darśe ca paurṇamāse ca puṇyeṣu divaseṣu api rudrākṣa dhāraṇāt sadyas sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe saptamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca bhūtaśuddhi prakāram ca kathayāmi mahā mune mūlādhārāt samutthāya kuṇḍalīm para devatām suṣumnā mārgam āśritya brahmarandhra gatām smaret maṃtram brahmani saṃyojya haṃsa mantreṇa sādhakaḥ pāda ādi jānu paryantam catuṣkoṇam sa vajrakam taṃ bīja āḍhyam svarṇa vaṇam smaret avani maṇḍalam jānu ādyam nābhi candra ardha nibham padma drayā aṃkitam baṃ bīja yutam śveta ābham ambhasaḥ maṇḍalam smaret nābhyāḥ hṛdaya paryantam trikoṇam svastika anvitam raṃ bījena yutam raktam smaret pāvaka maṇḍalam hṛdaḥ bhrū madhya paryantam vṛtam yam bīja yuktam dhūmra ābham nabhasvat maṇḍalam smaret prati brahmarandhra bhū madhyāt vṛtam svaccham manoharam haṃ bīja yuktam ākāśa maṇḍalam ca vicitayet evaṃbhūtāni saṃcitya pratyekam saṃvilāpayet mahantam prakṛtau māyām ātmani pravilāpayet śuddha saṃvid mayaḥ bhūtvā citayet pāpapūruṣam vāma kukṣi sthitam kṛṣṇam aṅguṣṭha parimāṇa kam madirā pāna hṛdayam guru talpa kaṭi yutam haṅga carma dharam kṛṣṇaiḥ madhas vaktram su duḥsaham sudhā bījena deha uttham bhasma saṃplāvayet sudhīḥ bhū bījena ghanīkṛtya bhasma tat kanaka aṇḍa vat viśuddha mukura ākāram japan bījam vihāyasaḥ mūrdha ādi pāda paryantāni aṅgāni racayet sudhīḥ ākāśa ādīni bhūtāni punar utpādayet citaḥ so'ham mantreṇa ca ātmānam ānayet hṛdaya ambuje yad kuṇḍalī jīvam ādāya para saṅgāt sudhā mayam saṃsthāpya hṛdaya ambhoje mūlādhāra gatām smaret raktām rūḍhā kara abjaiḥ śūlam kodaṇḍam iad bhava maṇi guṇam api aṅkuśam pañca vāṇān bibhrāṇā asūn kapālam trinayana lasitā pīna vakṣoruha āḍhayā devī vāla arka varṇā bhavatu sukha karā prāṇaśaktiḥ parā naḥ evam dhyātvā prāṇaśakti paramātma svarūpiṇīm vakṣye dhāraṇe ca mahā phalam śruti smṛti pramāṇa uktam bhasma dhāraṇam uttamam iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe aṣṭamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca idam śirovratam cīṇam vidhivat yat vijātibhiḥ teṣām eva parām vidyām vadet ajñāna bādhakām mārta samācāraḥ teṣām anupakārakaḥ śiras vrata samācārāt eva brahma ādi devatāḥ śirovratasya māhātmyam pūrvaiḥ pūrvataram kṛtam brahmā rudraḥ ca devatāḥ sakalāḥ api śirovratam idam nāma śirasi ātharvaṇa śrutyāḥ śākhā bhedeṣu nāmāni vratasya asya vibhedataḥ paṭhyate muni śārdūlaiḥ śākhāsu eka vratam hi tat sarva śākhāsu vastu ekam śiva ākhyam satya cit dhanam tathā tad viṣayam jñānam tathā eva ca śirovratam api sarvāsu vidyāsu saḥ adhikārī na saṃśayaḥ mahā vratam idam kārya pāpa kāntāra dāhakam śrutiḥ ātharvaṇā sūkṣmā sūkṣma arthasya prakāśiṇī agniḥ ityādibhiḥ mantraiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ śuddhena bhasmanā yat saṃdhyā kāleṣu sādaram dvādaśa abdam atha abdam vā tad ardham ca tad ardhakam prakuryāt dvādaśa aham vā saṃkalpena śiras vratam sirā vratena yaḥ snātaḥ tam tu mā upadiśet tu yaḥ tasya vidyā vinaṣṭā syāt nirghṛṇaḥ sa guruḥ khalu brahma vidyā guruḥ sākṣāt muniḥ kāruṇikaḥ khalu yathā sarveśvaraḥ śrīmān mṛduḥ kāruṇikaḥ khalu janma antara sahasreṣu narāḥ ye dharma cāriṇaḥ teṣām eva khalu śraddhā jāyate na kadācana pratyuta ajñāna bāhulyāt veṣaḥ eva vijāyate brahma vidyā upadeśasya sākṣāt eva adhikāriṇaḥ yaiḥ dvijaiḥ ādareṇa tu teṣām eva upadeṣṭavyam iti veda anuśāsanam saḥ tān hatvā na pāpīyāḥ bhavet vedāṃta niścayaḥ tripuṇḍra dhāraṇam proktam jābālaiḥ ādareṇa tu tryambakeṇa mantreṇa sa tāreṇa śivena ca tripuṇḍū dhārayet nityam gṛhastha āśramam āśritaḥ dhārayet bhikṣukaḥ nityam iti jābālikī śrutiḥ medhāvī ityādinā vā api brahmacārī dine dine lalāṭe dhārayet nityam tiryañc bhasma avaguṇṭhanam mad brāhmaṇa bhūtena tripuṇḍram bhasmanā dhṛtam pañcākṣareṇa mantreṇa praṇavena tathā eva ca tripuṇḍram dhārayet nityam saṃnyāsa āśramam āśritaḥ mantreṇa medhāvī ityādinā athavā namaḥ antena śivena eva śūdraḥ śuśrūṣaṇe rataḥ anyeṣām api sarveṣām vinā mantreṇa suvrataiḥ harṣeṇa samādāya śuddhe pātre nidhāya tat prakṣālya pādī hastau ca dvis ācamya samāhitaḥ śanais prāṇāyāma trayam kṛtvā agniḥ ityādi mantritam om om apaḥ jyotiḥ iti uktvā dhyātvā mantrān udīrayet jāyate na atra saṃśayaḥ tatas dhyātvā mahā viṣṇum jagannātham jalādhipam skaṃdheṣu sva āśrama ucita mantrāt madhyamā anāmi ka aṅguṣṭhaiḥ anuloma vilomāt tripuṇḍram dhārayet nityam tri kāleṣu api bhaktyāḥ iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skaṃdhe navamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca hi gauṇam nānāvidham viddhi brahman brahma vidām varaiḥ aupāsana samutpannam gṛhasthānām viśeṣataḥ śūdrāṇām na agni samudbhavam anyeṣām api sarveṣām dhāryam dāva anala udbhavam paurṇamāsī deśaḥ svīyaḥ parigrahaḥ mahā kṣetra ārāma ādi araṇyam vā praśastaḥ śubha lakṣaṇaḥ tatra pūrva trayodaśyām susnātaḥ su kṛta agnikaḥ anujñāpya svam ācāryam saṃpūjya praṇipatya ca pūjām vaiśeṣikīm kṛtvā śukla ambara dharaḥ svayam śuddha yajña upavītī ca śukla mālya anulepanaḥ darbha āsane samāsīnaḥ darbha muṣṭi pragṛhya ca prāṇāyāma trayam kṛtvā prāc mukhaḥ vā api udak mukhaḥ dhyātvā devam ca devīm ca tad vijñāpana vartmanā bhavet saṃkalpa dīkṣitaḥ yāvat śarīrapātam vā dvādaśa abdam atha api vā tad artham vā tad artham vā māsa dvādaśakam tu vā tad ardham vā tad artham vā māsam ekam atha api vā agnim ādhāya vividha dvirajā homa kāraṇāt pūta ahāt puratas bhūyas tattvānām śuddhim uddiśan mūlamantreṇa taiḥ eva samidh ādibhiḥ paścāt bhūta ādi tanmātraḥ pañca karma indriyāṇi ca jñāna karma vibhedena pañca pañca vibhāgaśaḥ tvac ādi dhātavaḥ sapta pañca prāṇa ādi vāyavaḥ manaḥ buddhiḥ ahaṃkāraḥ guṇāḥ prakṛti puruṣau rāgaḥ vidyā kalā niyatiḥ kālaḥ eva ca māyā ca śuddhavidyā ca maheśvara sadāśivo ca ca viduḥ atha gomayam ādāya piṇḍīkṛtya abhimantrya ca prabhāte ca caturdaśyām kṛtvā sarva purā uditam tasmin dine nirāhāraḥ kāla śeṣam samāpayet prātar parvaṇi ca api evam kṛtvā homa avasānāt upasaṃhṛtya rudra agnim gṛhītvā nataḥ tatas ca jaṭilaḥ muṇḍaḥ śikhā eka jaṭaḥ eva ca bhūtvā snātvā punar vīta lajjaḥ ced syāt digambaraḥ vā eka ambaraḥ valkalavān bhavet daṇḍī ca mevalī prakṣālya caraṇau paśvāt vis ācamyā ācam ā manas tanum agniḥ ityādibhiḥ mantraiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ ātha vaṅgaiḥ kramāt vimṛjya aṅgāni mūrbha ādi varaṇa antam ca taiḥ spṛśet sarva āṅgolanam kuryāt praṇavena śivena vā tatas ca puṃḍra rajayetryiāyuṣa samāhvayam śiva bhāvam samāgamya śiva bhāvam ayā ācaret tad paśu tvam parityajya kṛtvā pāśupatam vratam pūjanīyaḥ mahādevaḥ liṅga mūrtiḥ sadāśivaḥ balam ārogyam śrī puṣṭi vardhanam yatas rakṣā artham maṅgala artham ca sarva sampad sammṛddhaye bhasma snigdha manuṣyāṇām mahā mārī bhayam na ca śāntikam pauṣṭikam bhasma kāma dam ca bhavet iti śrī devībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe daśamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca trividha tvam pravakṣyāmi devarṣe bhasmanaḥ śṛṇu mahā pāpa kṣaya karam mahā kīrti karam param brāhma mantraḥ tu saṃdagdham tat śānti kṛt iha ucyate sa avadhānaḥ tu gṛhṇīyāt naraḥ vai gomayam tu yat tat vaḍabāṅgena dahet atas pauṣṭikam tat samākhyātam kāma dam ca tatas śṛṇu gavām goṣṭheṣu gatvā tu namaskṛtvā tu gokulam gavām varṇa anurūpāṇām gṛhṇīyāt gomayam śubham brāhmaṇasya ca gauḥ śvetā raktā gauḥ kṣatriyasya ca pīta varṇā tu vaiśyasya kṛṣṇā śūdrasya kathyate paurṇamāsyām amāvāsyām aṣṭamyām vā viśuddha dhīḥ prasādena tu mantreṇa gṛhītvā gomayam śubham hṛdayena tu mantreṇa piṃḍīkṛtya tu gomayam tuṣeṇa vā busaiḥ vā api prāsāde na tu nikṣipet araṇi udbhavam agni vā śrotriya āgāra jam tu vā gṛhṇīyāt atha tatra agnikuṇḍāt bhasma vicakṣaṇaḥ navam pātram samādāya prasādena tu nikṣipet bhāṭalī ketakī pāṭalī tadvat uśarīram candanam tathā nānā sugandhi dravyāṇi kāśmīra prabhṛtīni ca nikṣipet tatra pātre tu sadyas mantreṇa śuddha dhīḥ yat yat yat yat yat tat tat tat tat tat tat bhasma snānam samācaret prakṣālya pādau hastau ca śirau īśāna mantrāt sadyomantreṇa sarva aṅgam vicakṣaṇaḥ prakṣālya pādī hastau ca paścāt ācamanam caret tripuṇḍram tu vidhīyate pañca aṅgulī prasādena tu mantrāt tri aṅgulaiḥ vinyaset bhāle śiromantreṇa deśikaḥ savyena dakṣiṇe karṇe vāmadevena vāmatas tu kaṇṭhe ca madhyāṅgulyā spṛśet gudam hṛdayam hṛdayena eva tribhiḥ aṅgulibhiḥ spṛśet deśikaḥ nyaset dhīmān kavacena tri yaṅgulaiḥ madhyena saṃspṛśet nābhau īśānaḥ iti mantrāt brahma viṣṇu maheśānāḥ tisraḥ rekhāḥ iti smṛtāḥ maheśvaraḥ eka aṅgulena nyastam yat īśvaraḥ tatra devatā śiras madhye svayam brahmā īśvaraḥ tu lalāṭake kṣatriyaḥ ca tathā vaiśyaḥ śūdraḥ ca uddhūlanam tyajet sarveṣām antya jātīnām mantreṇa rahitam bhavet manuṣyāṇām api mantra binā bhavet mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe ekādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca kam imāḥ kṛtsu accham gṛhītvā gagane patat na klinnam na api kaṭhinam na durgandham na coṣitam upari oghaḥ parityajya gṛhṇīyāt patitam yadi piṇḍīkṛtya śiva āmni ādau tat kṣipet mūla mantritam ādāya vā arasā ācchādya bhasma ādhāne vinikṣipet su kṛte su dṛr̤he śuddhe kṣālite prokṣite śubhe taijasam dāravam ca atha mṛd mayam cailam eva ca anyat vā śobhanam śuddham bhasma ādhāram prakalpayet prasthitaḥ bhasma gṛhṇīyāt svayam ca anucaraḥ api vā na saṃspṛśet tu na ūcā aṅgaiḥ na kṣipena ca laṃghayet tasmāt bhasitam ādāya viniyuñjīta mantritam yadīya ācaraṇena eva śiva tulyaḥ na saṃśayaḥ bhaktyā paramayā grāhyam prārthayitvā tu pūjayet tantrā uta vartmanā siddham bhasma tāṃtrika pūjakaiḥ śūdraiḥ kāpālikaiḥ vā atha pākhaṇḍaiḥ aparaiḥ tu tat tripuṇḍram dhārayet bhaktyā manasā api na laṅghayet tripuṇḍra dhāraṇam bhaktyā tathā deha avaguṇṭhanam tripuṇḍram ca bhaktyā na eva ācaranti ye teṣām na asti vinirmokṣaḥ saṃsārāt janma koṭibhiḥ yeṣām vapuḥ manuṣyāṇām tripuṇḍreṇa triṇā āsthitam śmaśāna sadṛśam tat syāt na prekṣyam puṇya kṛt janaiḥ dhik anīśa arcanam janma dhik vidyām aśiva āśrayām yathā kṛśānu rahitaḥ bhūdharaḥ na virājate aśeṣa sādhane api evam bhasma hīnam śiva arcanam tripuṇḍram ca śraddhayā na ācaranti ye taiḥ pūrva ācaritam sarvam viparītam bhavet api bhasmanā vedamantreṇa tripuṇḍrasya ca vāraṇam vinā veda ucita ācāram smārtasya anartha kāraṇam syāt akṛtam tena śrutam api aśrutam bhavet adhītam anadhītam ca tripuṇḍram yaḥ na dhārayet vṛthak vedāḥ vṛthak yajñāḥ vṛthak dānam vṛthak tapaḥ vṛthak vrata upavāsena tripuṇḍram yaḥ na dhārayet sraṣṭā sṛṣṭi chalena āha tripuṇḍrasya ca dhāraṇam tiryañc rekhāḥ pradṛśyante lalāṭe sarva dehinām tathā api mānavāḥ mūrkhāḥ na kurvati tripuṇḍakam na tat dhyānam na tat mokṣam na tat jñānam na tat tapaḥ vinā tiryaktra puṇḍram ca vipreṇa yat anuṣṭitam vedasya adhyayane śūdraḥ na adhikārī yathā bhavet tripuṇḍreṇa vinā vipraḥ na adhikārī śiva arcane prāc mukhaḥ caraṇī hastī prakṣālya ācamya pūrvavat prāṇān āyamya saṃkalpya bhasma snānam samācaret pañca amū tu mantreṇa sva mūrdhani vinikṣipet sarva aṅga praṇavena eva mantreṇa udbalanam tatas etat āgneyakam snānam uditam parama ṛṣibhiḥ sarva karma samṛddhi artham kuryāt ādau idam budhaḥ tatas prakṣālya hasta ādīn upaspṛśya yathāvidhi tiryavipuṇḍram vidhinā lalāṭe hṛdaye gale satyam śaucam japaḥ homaḥ tīrtham deva ādi pūjanam tripuṇḍa dhṛk vipra varaḥ yaḥ rudra akṣa dharaḥ śuciḥ sa paṃkti pāvanaḥ śrāddhe pūjyaḥ vipraiḥ suraiḥ api dhṛta tripuṇḍaḥ pūta ātmā mṛtyun jayati mānavaḥ bhasma dhāraṇa māhātmyam bhūyas api kathayāmi te iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe dvādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca mahāpa taka saṃghāḥ ca pātakāni aparāṇi api tathā tathā tathā naśyanti muni śārdūlaiḥ satyam satyam na ca anyathā ekam bhasma dhṛtam yena tasya puṇya phalam śṛṇu yatīnām jñāna dam proktam vanasthānām virakti dam gṛhasthānām mune tadvat dharma vṛddhi karam tathā brahmacarya āśrama sthānām svādhyāya pradam eva ca śūdrāṇām puṇya dam nityam anyeṣām pāpa nāśanam rakṣā artham sarva bhūtānām vidhatte vaidikā śrutiḥ yajña tvena eva sarveṣām vidhatte vaidikā śrutiḥ sarva dharma tayā teṣām vidhatte vaidikī śrutiḥ māheśvarāṇām liṅga artham vidhatte vaidikā śrutiḥ vijñāna artham ca sarveṣām vidhatte vaidikā śrutiḥ hiraṇyagarbhena tad avatāraiḥ varuṇa ādibhiḥ devatābhiḥ dhṛtam bhasma tripuṇḍra udbhūlana ātmakam umā devyā ca lakṣmyā ca vācā ca anyābhiḥ āstikaiḥ sarva strībhiḥ dhṛtam bhasma tripuṇḍra uddūlana ātmanā munibhiḥ ca dhṛtam bhasma tripuṇḍra uddūlana ātmanā yakṣa rākṣama gandharva siddha vidyādhara ādibhiḥ brāhmaṇaiḥ kṣatriyaiḥ vaiśyaiḥ śūdraiḥ api ca saṃkaraiḥ tripuṇḍra uddhūlana ātmanā uddūlanam tripuṇḍram ca yaiḥ samācaritam mudā te te eva śiṣṭāḥ vidvasaḥ na itare muni puṃgavaiḥ maṇiḥ saṃkhyam mantra pañcākṣaraḥ tathā vibhūtiḥ oṣadham puṃsām mukti strī vaśyā karmaṇi bhunakti yatra bhasma aṅgaḥ mūrkhaḥ vā paṇḍitaḥ api vā tatra bhuṃkte mahādevaḥ sa patnīkaḥ vṛṣadhvajaḥ pumān tripuṇḍra dhāriṇe bhikṣā pradānena hi kevalam tena adhītam śrutam tena tena sarvam anuṣṭhitam yena vipreṇa śirasi tripuṇḍra bhasmanā kṛtam teṣu api deśeṣu yatra bhūtivibhūṣaṇaḥ mānavaḥ tu vaset nityam kāśi kṣetra samam hi tat śola yuktaḥ vā yoga yuktaḥ api alakṣaṇaḥ saḥ api yām gatim āpnoti na tām yajña śataiḥ api samparkāt līlayā vā api bhayāt vā dhārayet tu yaḥ śivasya viṣṇādavānām brahmanaḥ tṛpti kāraṇam pārvatyāḥ ca mahā lakṣmyāḥ bhāratyāḥ tṛpti kāraṇam na tīrtha yātrayā puṇyam tripuṇḍreṇa ca labhyate dānam dharmāḥ ca tīrtha yātrāḥ ca nāradaiḥ dhyānam tarpa astra puṇḍrasya kalām na arhati ṣoḍaśām yathā rājā sva cihna aṅkam sva janam manyate sadā tathā śivaḥ tripuṇḍrākam rudraḥ tena vaśīkṛtaḥ dvijātiḥ vā anya jātiḥ vā bhasmanā tyakta sarva āśrama ācāra ūm lupta sava kriyaḥ api saḥ dhārayet yaḥ tripuṇḍra aṅka sakṛt tirya tripuṇḍra aṅkam dhārayet saḥ api mucyane na asya jñānam parīkṣeta na kulam na vratam tathā tripuṇḍra aṃkita bhālena pūjyaḥ eva hi nārada śiva mantrāt paraḥ mantraḥ na asti tulyam śivāt param śiva arcanāt param puṇyam na hi tīrtham ca bhasmanā dhvaṃsanam sarva duḥkhānām sarva pāpa viśodhanam antyajaḥ vā adhamaḥ bā api mūrkhaḥ vā paṇḍitaḥ api vā yasmin deśe vaset nityam bhūtiśāsana saṃyutaḥ tasmin sadāśivaḥ sa umaḥ sarva bhūta gaṇaiḥ vṛtaḥ sarva tīrtheḥ ca saṃyuktaḥ sāṃnidhyam kurute sadā etāni pañca śiva mantra pavitritāni bhasmāni kāma dahana aṅga vibhūṣitāni puṇḍrakāṇi racitāni lalāṭa paṭṭe lumpanti daiva likhitāni durakṣarāṇi iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśe skaṃdhe trayodaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca bhasma digdha śarīrāya yaḥ dadāti dhanam mudā tasya sarvāṇi pāpāni vinaśyati na saṃśayaḥ śrutayaḥ smṛtayaḥ sarvāḥ purāṇāni akhilāni api badanti bhūti māhātmyam tat tasmāt tat dhārayet dvijaḥ sarva trisaṃdhyam ācaret nityam āśu yogam avāpnuyāt bhasma snānam jala snānāt asaṃkhyeya guṇa anvitam tat phalam labhate sarvam bhasma snānā atra saṃśayaḥ mahāpātaka yuktaḥ vā yuktaḥ vā api upapātakaiḥ evam uktam śibena ādau tadā snātaḥ svayam śivaḥ tadā prabhṛti brahma ādyāḥ munayaḥ ca śiva ajinaḥ tasmāt etat śiraḥ snānam āgneyam yaḥ samācaret anena eva śarīreṇa saḥ hi rudraḥ na saṃśayaḥ ye bhasma dhāriṇam dṛṣṭvā paritṛptāḥ bhavanti te deva asura muni indraḥ ca pūjyāḥ nityam na saṃśayaḥ bhasma saṃchanna sarva aṅgam dṛṣṭavā uttiṣṭhati yaḥ pumān tam dṛṣṭvā devarājaḥ api daṇḍa vat praṇamiṣyati abhakṣya bhakṣaṇam yeṣām bhasma dhāraṇa pūrvakam teṣām tat bhakṣyam eva syāt mune na atra vicāraṇā yaḥ snāti bhasmanā nityam jale snātvā tatas param brahmacārī gṛhasthaḥ vā vānaprasthaḥ a yava ādarāt āgneyam bhasmanā snānam yatīnām ca viśiṣyate ārdra snānāt varam bhasma snānam ārdra vadhaḥ dhruvaḥ tu prakṛtim vidyāt prakṛti bandhanam viduḥ prakṛtyāḥ tu prahāṇāya bhasmanā snānam iṣyate rakṣā artham maṅgala artham ca pavitra artham purā suraiḥ bhasma dṛṣṭvā mune pūrvam dattam daivyai priyeṇa tu tasmāt etat śiraḥ snānam āgneyam yaḥ samācaret pūtanā kuṣṭha gulmakāḥ bhagaṃdarāṇi sarvāṇi ca aśītiḥ vātarogakāḥ catuḥṣaṣṭiḥ pitta rogāḥ śleṣmāḥ saptatripañcakāḥ bhasma snānena naśyanti siṃhena iva yathā gajāḥ yathāvidhi lalāṭe vai vahni vīrya pradhāraṇāt nāśayet likhitām yāmām lalāṭa sthām lipi dhruvam kaṇṭha upari kṛtam pāpam nāśayet tad pradhāraṇāt ca dhāraṇāt kaṇṭha bhoga ādi kṛta pātakam bāhvoḥ bāhu kṛtam pāpam vakṣasā manasā kṛtam nābhau śiśna kṛtam pāpam gude guda kṛtam haret pārśvayoḥ dhāraṇāt brahman para strī āliṅgana ādikam brahma viṣṇu maheśānām trayī agnīnām ca dhāraṇam guṇa loka trayāṇām ca dhāraṇam tena vai kṛtam bhasma niṣṭhasya dahyante doṣāḥ bhasma agni saṃgamāt bhasma snāna viśuddha ātmā ātma niṣṭhaḥ iti smṛtaḥ bhasmanā bhasmī tripuṇḍrakaḥ bhasma śāyī ca puruṣaḥ bhasma niṣṭhaḥ iti smṛtaḥ bhūta preta piśāca ādyāḥ rogāḥ atīva duḥsahāḥ bhasma niṣṭhasya sāṃnidhyāt vidravanti na saṃśayaḥ bhāsanāt bhasitam proktam bhasma kalmaṣa bhakṣaṇāt bhūta preta puraḥsarāḥ bhūtiḥ bhūti karā puṃsām rakṣā rakṣā karā purā tripuṇḍra cāriṇam dṛṣṭvā bhītāḥ prakapitāḥ śīghram naśyati eva na saṃśayaḥ smaraṇāt eva rudrasya yathā pāpam praṇaśyati amba kārya sahasrāṇi kṛtvā yaḥ snāti bhasmanā kṛtvā api ca atulam pāpam mṛtyu kāle api yaḥ dvijaḥ bhasma snāyī bhavet kaścid kṣipram pāpaiḥ pramucyate bhasma snānāt viśuddha ātmā jita kromraḥ jita indriyaḥ tam acitam śaṃkaram dṛṣṭvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate mad athavā vidvāḥ bhūti kāmaḥ athavā naraḥ tripuṇḍram paramam puṇyam brahma viṣṇu śiva ātmakam ye ghorāḥ rākṣasāḥ pretāḥ ye ca anye kṣudra jantavaḥ puṇḍra dhāriṇam dṛṣṭvā palāyante na saṃśayaḥ kṛtvā śauca ādikam karma snātvā tu vimale jale kevalam vāruṇam snānam dehe bāhya mala apaham mana bāhya antara mala apaham tyaktvā snānam tad paraḥ syāt na saṃśayaḥ kṛtam api akṛtam satyam bhasma snānam vinā mune antar bahis ca saṃśuddham śiva pūjā phalam śiva pūjā phalam labhet yat vāhya mala mātrasya nāśakam snānam asti tat tat vivayati tīvreṇa prāṇi bāhya antaram malam kṛtvā api koṭīḥ nityam vāruṇam snānam ādarāt na bhavati eva pūta ātmā bhasma snānam vinā mune yat vā veda mahādevaḥ sarva veda śikhāmaṇiḥ saḥ eva ekaḥ sarva karmasu adhikārī śruti śrutaḥ pāvanam pāvanānām ca bhasma snānam śruti śrutam anantaiḥ vāruṇaiḥ snānaiḥ yat puṇyam prāpyate dvijaiḥ tatas ananta guṇam puṇyam bhasma snānāt avāpyate mūtra ādi utsarjana ante tu bhasma snānam prayatnāt kartavyam anyathā pūtāḥ na bhaviṣyanti mānavāḥ na bhaviṣyati pūta ātmā na adhikārī api karmaṇi apāna vāyu niryāte jṛmbhaṇe skandane kṣute śleṣma udgāre api kartavyam bhasma snānam prayatnāt hi bhasmasnāna māhātmyasya eka deśaḥ atra varṇitaḥ sa avadhānena manasā śrotavyam muni puṃgavaiḥ iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe caturdaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha pañcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāṇaḥ uvāca tripuṇḍram kevalam dvijaiḥ brahma kṣatriya vaiśyāḥ ca ete sarve dvijāḥ smṛtāḥ samācaret tat kṛtam cākata prāyam bhavati eva na saṃśayaḥ na gāyatrī upadeśaḥ api bhasmanaḥ dhāraṇam vinā mūlam eva āhuḥ brahmaṇye muni puṃgavaiḥ tā bhasma dhāraṇā abhāve na kena api upadiśyate bhasma hīna lalāṭa tvam na brāhmaṇyā anumāpakam mantra pūtam sitam bhasma lalāṭe parivartate saḥ caṇḍālaḥ iti jñeyaḥ janma janma antare dhruvam na yasya sahajā prītiḥ tripuṇḍra uddūlana ādiṣu saḥ cāṇḍālaḥ iti jñeyaḥ satyam satyam mayā ucyate pūjayiṣyati sa durbhagaḥ śiva dveṣṭā sa dveṣaḥ naraka pradaḥ tyaktvā kurvan hema tulām api gata upavītaiḥ saṃdhyāyām kāryaḥ pratinidhiḥ kvacid japa ādikam tu sāvitryāḥ tathā eva upoṣaṇa ādikam karoti pratyavaiti eva yena asaḥ na adhikārī tadā dvijaḥ yathā śrutvā antyajaḥ vedān pratyavaiti tathā dvijaḥ saṃpādanīyam yatnena śrītam bhasma sadā dvijaiḥ smārtam vā tad abhāve tu laukikam vā samāhitaiḥ yādṛśam tādṛśam vā astu pavitram bhasma saṃtatam dhāraṇīyam prayatnena dvijaiḥ saṃdhyā ādi karmasu na saṃviśanti pāpāni bhasma niṣṭhe tatas sadā ṣaṣ aṅgula āyatam mānam api ca adhika mānakam netra yugma pramāṇena bhāle dīptam tripuṇḍrakam kadācid bhasmanā kuryāt saḥ rudraḥ na atra saṃśayaḥ takāraḥ anāmikā proktaḥ ukāraḥ madhyamā aṅguliḥ makāraḥ tarjanī tasmāt tripuṇḍram triguṇa ātmakam tripuṇḍram madhyamā tarjanya nāmābhiḥ anulomāt tadācid atha durvāsāḥ pitṛ lokam gataḥ abhavat bhasma saṃdigdha sarva aṅgaḥ rudra akṣa ābharaṇa anvitaḥ śivaiḥ śaṃkaraiḥ sarvātman śrīmātar jagadambike nāmāni iti gṛṇan uccais tāpasānām śikhāmaṇiḥ te tu pratyutthāna abhivādanaiḥ mānam bahu cakrire nānā kathābhiḥ anyonya sambhāṣām cakrire tadā tasmin tu samaye kumbhīpāka sthānām tu pāpinām mṛtāḥ sma iti vadanti eke dagdhāḥ sma iti pare jaguḥ chinnāḥ sma iti vibhinnāḥ sma iti evam rodana kāriṇaḥ śrutvā tam karuṇam śabdam duḥkhitaḥ muni rāj hṛdi papraccha pitṛ nāthān tān kān śabdaḥ ayam iti ati atra nānā dūtaiḥ kāla rūpaiḥ kṛṣṇa varṇaiḥ bhayaṃkaraiḥ tatra kuṇḍāni anekāni pāpinām bhoga dāni ca ṣaḍaśītiḥ ghora rūpaiḥ dūtaiḥ parivṛtāni ca tatra mukhyatamam kuṇḍam kumbhīpāka abhidham mahat tad gatānām ca yātanānām tu varṇanam śrīmat devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe bhadhyāyaḥ ye śiva drohinaḥ saṃti tathā devī vinindakāḥ ye veda nindakāḥ santi sūryasya ca gaṇeśituḥ brāhmaṇānām drohinaḥ ye patanti atra eva te mune kāma ācārāḥ ca ye santi tapta mudrā aṃkitāḥ ca ye triśūla dhāriṇaḥ ye ca patanti atra eva te mune mātṛ pitṛ guru jyeṣṭha purāṇa smṛti nindakāḥ teṣām ayam mahā ghoraḥ śabdaḥ śravaṇaiḥ dāruṇaḥ śrūyate asmābhiḥ aniśam vairāgyam yat śrutyāḥ bhavet iti teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā muni rāj tad didṛkṣayā utthāya calitaḥ tūrṇam yayau kuṇḍa samīpatas tasmin eva kṣaṇe mune tatrasthānām pāpinām tu svarga adhikam abhūt sukham mṛdaṅga murajā vīṇā ḍhakkā dundubhi nisvanāḥ samudbhūtāḥ tu madhurāḥ pañcama svara bhūṣitāḥ vasanta vallī puṣpāṇām sugandha marutaḥ bavuḥ muniḥ tu cakitaḥ dṛṣṭvā yama dūtāḥ ca vismitāḥ hīghra te kathayāmāsuḥ dharmarājāya bedine svargāt api adhikam saukhyam kumbhīpāka stha pāpinām nimittam na eva jānīmaḥ kasmāt idam abhūt vibho niśamyam dūta vāṇīm tām dharmarāj śīghram utthitaḥ mahā mahiṣam ārūḍhaḥ yayau te yatra pāpinaḥ tām vārttām preṣayāmāsa dūta dvārā amarāvatīm ha śrutvām tām devarājaḥ api prāptaḥ deva gaṇaiḥ saha brahma lokāt padmajaḥ api vaikuṇṭhāt viṣṭaraśravāḥ tad tad lokāt ca dikpālāḥ samājagmuḥ gaṇaiḥ saha apaśyan tad gatān jīvān svarga adhika sukha anvitān tatra saukhyam padā jātam tadā pāpāt tu kim bhayam ucchinnā beda maryādā parameśa kṛtā katham māścaryam etat āśvaryam etat iti eva bhāṣiṇaḥ yayau kaiścid sura gaṇaiḥ sahitaḥ śaṃkara ālayam pārvatyā sahitam devam koṭi kandarpa sundaram ramaṇīyatama aṅgam tam lāvaṇya khanim adbhutam nānā alaṃkāra bhūṣitam nānā guṇaiḥ parivṛtam lālayantam parām śivām vṛttāntam kathayāmāsa camatkṛta mati sphuṭam asya kāraṇam devaiḥ na jānomaḥ kathaṃcana tadā śrutvā prasanna mukha paṅkajaḥ uvāca madhuram vākyam megha gambhīrayā girā śṛṇu viṣṇo tad nimittam na āśrayam tu atra vidyate tat tat tat tat tat tat tatra tatra mataḥ itas param tu tat toyam pitṛ loka nivāsinām tu tad nāmnā api atas ūrdhvam bhaviṣyati trailokye yāni tīrthāni tatra śreṣṭham idam bhavet tu trailokyam pūjitam bhavet uvāca iti deva vacaḥ śrutvā devam mūrdhanā praṇamya ca tad anujñām samādāya yayau deva antikam hariḥ tat sarvam kathayāmāsa kāraṇam śaṃkara uditam śaśaṃsuḥ bhasma māhātmyam hari brahma ādayaḥ surāḥ pitaraḥ ca eva surāḥ pitaraḥ ca eva santuṣṭāḥ tīrtha lābhāt paraṃtapaiḥ tatī tīre ligam ca devyāḥ mūrti yathāvidhi sthāpayāmāsuḥ amarāḥ pūjayāmāsuḥ anvaham tatra mama prāṇinaḥ abhūvan pāpa bhoga artham āsthitāḥ te vimānam samāruhya gatāḥ kailāsa maṇḍalam nāmnā bhadra gaṇāḥ te tu basanti adya api tatra hi punar ca dūra deśe tu kumbhīpākaḥ vinirmitaḥ muni śārdūlaiḥ baiṣṇava āgama lokanāt bhū puṇḍra pramāṇāni divyāni aṅguli bhedāt devyāḥ ca pravakṣyāmi phalāni ca parvata agre nadī tīre śiva kṣetre viśeṣataḥ sindhu tīre ca valmīke tulasī mūlam āśrite mṛdaḥ etāḥ tu saṃgrāhyāḥ varjayet anya mṛttikāḥ śyāmam śānti karam proktam raktam vaśyā karam bhavet bhavet tad anāmikā anna dā nityam mukti dā ca pradeśinī matsya kūrma ākṛtim vā api śaṅkha ākāram tatas param daśa aṅguli pramāṇam tu uttamottamam ucyate nava aṅgulam madhyamam syāt aṣṭa aṅgulam atas param sapta ṣaṣ pañcabhiḥ puṇḍram madhyamam trividham smṛtam catur tri dvi aṅgulaiḥ puṇḍram kaniṣṭham trividham bhavet lalāṭe keśavam vidyāt nārāyaṇam atha udare mādhavam hṛdi vinyasya govindam kaṇṭhakūpake udare dakṣiṇe pārśve viṣṇuḥ iti abhidhīyate trivikramam karṇa deśe vāma kukṣau tu vāmanam śrīdharam bāhuke vāme hṛṣīkeśam tu karṇake pṛṣṭhe ca padmanābham tu kakud dāmodaram smaret dvādaśa etāni nāmāni mūrdhani pūjā kāle home ca sāyam prātar samāhitaḥ nāmāni uccārya vidhinā dhārayet ūrdhva puṇḍrakam aśuciḥ vā api anācāraḥ manasā pāpam ācaret eva bhavet nityam mūrdhani puṇḍra aṃkitaḥ naraḥ ekāntinaḥ mad sva rūpa vidaḥ amalāḥ sāṃtarālān prakurvati puṇḍrān viṣṇu pada ākṛtīn parama ekāntinaḥ api evam mad pāda eka parāyaṇāḥ haridrā cūrṇa saṃyuktāt śūla ākārān tu vā amalān anye tu vaiṣṇavāḥ puṇḍrān acchidrān api bhaktyāḥ randīpa padma veṇu pattra upama ākṛtīn acchidrān api sa chidrān kuryuḥ kevala vaiṣṇavāḥ ekāntinām prapannānām parama kāntinām api tu kuryāt tu madhye chidram veṣṇavāḥ ca namaḥ ntaiḥ keśava ādibhiḥ vimalāni ūrdhva puṇḍrāṇi sa antarālāṇi naraḥ lakṣmyā sākam samāsīnaḥ ramate viṣṇu vyayaḥ nirantarālam yaḥ kuryāt ūrdhva puṇḍram dvija adhamaḥ tu yaḥ karoti vimūḍha dhīḥ sa paryāyeṇa tān eti narakān ekaviṃśatim ṛjūni sphuṭa pārśvāṇi sa antarālāṇi vinyaset ūrdhva puṇḍrāṇi daṃḍa abja dīpa matsya nibhāni ca śikhopavīta vat dhārya mūrdhva puṇḍram dvijena ca tasmāt sarveṣu kāryeṣu kāryam viprasya dhīmataḥ triśūlam ca bartulam caturasrakam ardhacandra ādikam liṅgam veda niṣṭhaḥ na dhārayet janmanā labdha jātiḥ tu āśritaḥ puṇḍra antaram bhramāt vā api lalāṭe na eva dhārayet khyāti kānti ādi siddhi caryam ca api viṣṇu āgama ādiṣu sthitam puṇḍra antaram na eva dhārayet vaidikaḥ janaḥ tiryaktra puṇḍram saṃtyajya śrītam katham api bhramāt lalāṭe bhasmanā tiryaktra guṇḍrasya ca dhāraṇam vārayan nārakī bhavet patati eva na saṃdehaḥ tathā puṇḍra antarāt api na aṅkanam vigrahe kuryāt veda mārgam samāśritaḥ hi śrota dharma eka niṣṭhānām liṅgam tu śrautam eva hi aśrauta dharma niṣṭānām aśrautam liṅgam īritam devatāḥ veda siddhāḥ yāḥ tāsām liṅga tu vaidikam niṣṭhāḥ yāḥ tāsām aśrotam eva hi mahādevaḥ sākṣāt saṃsāra mocakaḥ bhaktānām upakārāya śrītam liṅgam dadhāti ca śrītam liṅgam na ca itarat prādurbhāva viśeṣāṇām api tasya tat eva hi madhya liṅgam tu vijñeyam tripuṇḍra uddūlana ādikam puṇḍrakam lalāṭe bhasmanā tiryaktra puṇḍram dhāryam eva hi yaḥ tu nārāyaṇam devam prapannaḥ paramam padam dhārayet sarvadā śūlam lalāṭe gandha vāriṇā iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe paṃcadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca atha atas śrūyatām puṇyam saṃdhyā upāsanam uttamam bhasma vāraṇa māhātmyam kathitam ca eva vistarāt prātar saṃdhyā vidhānam ca kathayiṣyāmi te anagha prātaḥsaṃdhyām ma nakṣatrām madhyāhne madhya bhāskarām sa sūryām paścimām saṃdhyām tisraḥ saṃdhyāḥ upāsate tad bhedān vakṣyāmi śṛṇu deva ṛṣi sattama uttamā tāraka upetā madhyamā lupta tārakā tramā sūrya mahitā prātaḥsaṃdhyā tridhā matā tāraka upetā sāyaṃsaṃdhyā tridhā matā tasmāt mūlam yatnatas rakṣaṇīyam chinne mūle na eva vṛkṣaḥ na śākhā saṃdhyā yena na vijñātā saṃdhyā yena an upāsitā jīva mātā bhavet śūī mṛtaḥ śvā ca eva jāyate tāvat saṃdhyām upāsīta prāyaścittam tatas param tad kāla atikramaṇe jāte caturtha arghyam pradāpayet athavā aṣṭa gatam devīm japtvā ādau tām samācaret yasmin kāle tu yat karma tad kāla adhīśvarām ca tām saṃdhyām upāsya paścāt tu tad kālīnam samācaret gṛhe sādhāraṇā proktā goṣṭhe vai madhyamā bhavet nadī tīre ca uttamā syāt devī gehe tad uttamā tat ānantyāya kalpate etasyāḥ aparam devam brāhmaṇānām na vidyate na viṣṇu uraḥsanā nityā na śiva upāsanā tathā yathā bhavet mahādevyāḥ gāyatryāḥ śruti coditā sarva veda sāra bhūtā gāyatryāḥ tu samarcanā brahma ādayaḥ api saṃdhyāyām tām dhyāya iti japanti ca vedāḥ japanti tām nityam veda upāsyā tatas smṛtā tasmāt sarve dvijāḥ śāktāḥ na śaivāḥ na ca vaiṣṇavāḥ adiśaktin upāsate gāyatrī vedamātrīm prāṇam āyabhya keśava ādika nāmbhiḥ tathā nārāyaṇaḥ mādhavaḥ eva ca hṛṣīkeśaḥ padmanābhaḥ dāmodara atas param saṃkarṣaṇaḥ vāsudevaḥ pradyumnaḥ api aniruddhaḥ ca nārasiṃhaḥ acyutaḥ tathā manārdanaḥ upendraḥ ca hariḥ kṛṣṇaḥ antamaḥ tathā oṃkārapūrakam nāma caturviṃśati saṃkhyayā svāhā antaiḥ prāśayet vāri namaḥ ntaḥ sparśayet tathā bhairava ādi tribhiḥ pītvā dvābhyām prakṣālayet karau mukham prakṣālayet vābhyām dvābhyām unmārjanam tathā ekena pāṇī saṃprokṣya pādau api śiraḥ api ca saṃkarṣaṇa ādi devānām dvādaśa aṅgāni saṃspṛśet dakṣiṇena udakam pītvā vāmena saṃspṛśet budhaḥ tāvat na śudhyate toyam yāvat vāmena na spṛśet gokarṇa ākṛti hastena māṣa mātram jalam pibet tatas nyūna adhikam pītvā surā pāyī bhavet vijaḥ saṃhata aṅgulinā toyam pāṇinā dakṣiṇena tu mukta aṅguṣṭha kaniṣṭhābhyām śeṣeṇa ācamanam viduḥ prāṇāyāmam tatas kṛtvā praṇava smṛti pūrvakam dakṣiṇe vāmena pūrita udaram tambhena dhārayet nityam prāṇāyāmam viduḥ budhāḥ pīḍayet dakṣiṇām nāḍīm aṅguṣṭhena tathā uttarām kaniṣṭhā anāmikābhyām tu madhyamām tarjanīm tyajet recakaḥ sṛjate vāyum pūrakaḥ pūrayet tu tam nīlotpala dala śyāmam nābhi madhye pratiṣṭhitam recake śaṃkaram dhyāyet lalāṭa stham maheśvaram śuddha sphaṭika saṃkāśam nirmalam pāpa nāśanam pūrake viṣṇu sāyujyam kumbhake brahmaṇaḥ gatim recakena tṛtīyam tu prāpnuvāt īśvaram param porāṇa ācamana ādyam ca proktam deva pi sattamaiḥ mune praṇavam pūrvam uccārya gāyatrī tu tat iti ṛcam pāda ādau vyāhṛtīḥ tisraḥ śrīta ācamanam ucyate prati praṇava saṃyuktām tris ayam prāṇasaṃyamaḥ sa lakṣaṇam tu prāṇānām āyāmam kīrtyate adhunā nānā apāya eka śamanam mahā puṇya phala pradam pañca aṅgulibhiḥ nāsā agram pīḍayet praṇavena tu sarva pāpa harā mudrā vānaprastha gṛha svayoḥ kaniṣṭhā anāmikā aṅguṣṭhaiḥ brahmacāriṇaḥ mā apohiṣṭhā iti tisṛbhiḥ prokṣaṇam syāt kuśa udakaiḥ kuryāt tatas ācamanam kṛtvā sūrya ca iti pivet apaḥ bhinnam pāpam tasya vinaśyati praṇavena vyāhṛtibhiḥ gāyatryā praṇava ādyayā mārjanam ca eva kārayet uddhṛtya dakṣiṇe haste jalam gokarṇa vat kṛte gītvā tam nāsikā agram tu vāma kukṣī smaret adhas purupam kṛṣṇa varṇam ca ṛtam ca iti paṭhet tatas drupadām vai ṛcam pattra akṣa nāsā puṭena ca ha śvāsa mārgeṇa tam pāpam ānayet kara vāriṇi na avalokya eva tad vāri vāma bhāge aśmani kṣipet niṣpāpam tu śarīram mama saṃjātam iti bhāvayet gṛhītvā tu tarjanī aṅguṣṭha varjitam vīkṣya bhānum kṣipet vāri gāyatryā ca abhimantritam tatas pradakṣiṇām kuryāt asau āditya mantrāt īṣat namraḥ prabhāte tu madhyāhne daṇḍa vat sthitaḥ hi āsane ca upaviṣṭaḥ tu dvijaḥ sāyam kṣipepaḥ udakam prakṣipet yasmāt tat kāraṇam atas śṛṇu triṃśat koṭayaḥ mahā vīrāḥ mandehāḥ nāma rākṣasāḥ yataghnāḥ dāruṇāḥ ghorāḥ sūryam icchanti khāditum tatas deva gaṇāḥ sarve ṛṣayaḥ ca tapodhanāḥ upāsate mahā saṃdhyām prakṣipanti udaka añjalim tena daityāḥ te vajrī bhūtena vāriṇā etasmāt kāraṇāt viprāḥ saṃdhyām nityam upāsate mahā puṇyasya jananam saṃdhyā upāsanam īritam ardhya aṅga bhūta mantraḥ ayam procyate śṛṇu nāradaiḥ yat uccāraṇa mātreṇa sāṅgam saṃdhyā phalam bhavet saḥ aha asmi aham jyotiḥ ātmā jyotiḥ aham śivaḥ praviśya uttiṣṭha devi gaṃtavyam punarāgamanāya ca tatra āruhya japet paścāt gāyatrī vedamātrīm atra eva khecarī mudrā prāṇāyāma uttaram mune prātar saṃdhyā vidhāne ca kīrtitā muni puṃgavaiḥ tad nāma artham pravakṣyāmi sādaram śṛṇu nāradaiḥ bhruvoḥ antargatā dṛṣṭiḥ mudrā bhavati khecarī na ca āsanam siddha samam na kumbha sadṛśaḥ anilaḥ na khecarī samā mudrā satyam satyam ca nāradaiḥ ghaṇṭā vat praṇava uccārāt vāyum nirjitya yatnatas śṛṇu mantri mūla ghaṭitam kṛtvā dṛḍham vinyase sthāṇuḥ saṃyamita indriyaḥ acala dṛśā paśyan bhruvoḥ antaram āyātu vara dā devī akṣaram brahma saṃmitam gāyatrī chandasām mātar idam brahma juṣasva mama yat rātryā kurute pāpam tat rācyā pratimucyate tejaḥ asi ityādi mantreṇa devī mām āvāhayet tatas yat kṛtam tvad anuṣṭhānam tat sarvam pūrṇam astu mama tatas śāpa vimokṣāya vidhānam rāmyak ācaret basiṣṭha śāpaḥ iti etat vividham śāpa lakṣaṇam viśvāmitra smaraṇāt viśvāmitrasya śāpāt vasiṣṭha smaraṇāt eva tasya śāpaḥ vinaśyati hṛd padma madhye puruṣam purāṇam satya ātmakam sarva jagat svarūpam dhyāyāmi nityam paramātma saṃjñam cit rapam ekam vacasām agamyam atha nyāsa vidhi vakṣye saṃdhyāyāḥ aṅga sambhavam oṃkāram pūrvavat yojya tatas mantrān udīrayet bhuvaḥ pūrvam tu jānubhyām svar kaṭibhyām namaḥ vadet ca tatas parikīrtayet aṅguṣṭhābhyām tat savituḥ tarjanībhyām vareṇyakam anāmābhyām kaniṣṭhābhyām dhiyaḥ yaḥ naḥ padam vadet ca iti api mahi ātmane dhīmahi iti kavacāya tatas param praṇavam pūrvam uccārya varṇa nyāsaḥ prakīrtitaḥ tad kāram ādau uccārya pādāṅguṣṭha draye nyaset jānvoḥ tukāram vinyasya ūruvoḥ ca eva vakārakam rekāram ca gude nyasya ṇikāram liṅge eva ca kaṭau yakāram eva atra bhakāram nābhi maṇḍale yasyet ekāram stanayoḥ dvayoḥ hṛdi vinyasya syakāram kaṇṭhakūpake dhokāram mukha deśe tu makāram tālu deśake hikāram nāsikā agre tu dhikāram netra maṇḍale bhrū madhye ca eva yokāra yokāram ca lalāṭake nakāram vai pūrva mukhe prakāram dakṣiṇe mukhe yākāram mūrdhani vinyasya takāram vyāpakam nyaset tatas dhyāyet mahādevīm ambikām bhāsvat japā prasūna ābhām kumārīm parameśvarīm rakta ambuja āsana ārūḍhām rakta gandha anulepanām rakta mālya ambara dharām catur āsyām catur bhujām dvi netrām mālām kuṇḍikām ca eva vibhratīm sarva ābharaṇa sam dīptām ṛgveda adhyāyinīm parām haṃsa pattrām āhavanīya madhya sthām brahma devatām catuṣpadām aṣṭa kukṣi sapta śīrṣām maheśvarīm agni vaktrām rudra śikhām viṣṇu cittām tu bhāvayet brahmā tu kavacam yasyāḥ gotram sāṃkhyāyanam smṛtam hi āditya maṇḍala antar sthām dhyāyet devī maheśvarīm evam dhyātvā vidhānena gāyatrī vedamātrīm tatas mudrāḥ prakurvīta devyāḥ prīti karāḥ śubhāḥ sukham sampuṭam ca eva vitatam vistṛtam tathā tri mukham ca eva catuṣkam pañcakam tathā ca eva vyāpaka añjalikam tathā mahā śakaṭam yama pāśam ca grathitam sammukha unmukham muṣṭikam ca eva matsyam kūrma varāhakam mudgaram pallavam tathā bhagavant gāyatryāḥ saṃpradarśayet śata akṣarām ca gāyatrī sakṛt āvartayet sudhīḥ caturviṃśati akṣarāṇi gāyatryāḥ kīrtitāni hi jātavedasa nāmnīm ca ṛcam uccārayet tatas tryambakasya ṛcam āvṛtya gāyatrī śata varṇakā bhavati iyam mahā puṇyā asakṛt japyā budhaiḥ iyam oṃkāram pūrvam uccārya bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar tathā eva ca caturviṃśati akṣarām ca gāyatrī proccaret tatas evam nityam japam kuryāt brāhmaṇaḥ vipra puṃgavaḥ sa samagram phalam prāpya saṃdhyāyāḥ sukham edhate iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skaṃdhe ṣoḍaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca bhinnapādā tu gāyatrī brahmahatyā praṇāśinī bhavanti ye dvijāḥ adhomukhāḥ ca tiṣṭhati kalpa koṭi śatāni ca sampuṭa ekā paṣṭa oṃkārāḥ trividhā matā dharma śāstra purāṇeṣu itihāseṣu suvrata japa saṃkhyā aṣṭa bhāga ante pādaḥ japyaḥ turīyakaḥ pattra praṇava saṃyuktām sa dvijaḥ paramaḥ jñeyaḥ param sāyujyam āpnuyāt maṃpuṭakā ṣaṣ oṃkārā bhavet tā ūrdhvaretasām gṛhasthaḥ brahmacārī vā mokṣa arthī turiyām japet turīya pādaḥ gāyatryāḥ parorajase sā avadām acala parama sūkṣmam jyotiḥ ākāśa sāram bhavatu mama mude saccidānanda rūpaḥ triśūla yonim surabhim akṣamālām ca ligakam yā saṃkhyā sā eva gāyatrī saccidānanda rūpiṇī brāhmaṇaḥ nityam pūjayet ca namet tatas hyātasya pūjām kurvīta pañcabhiḥ ca upacārakaiḥ pṛthivī ātmane gandham arpayāmi namaḥ namaḥ haṃ ākāśa ātmane puṣpam ca arpayāmi namaḥ namaḥ yam ca vāyu ātmane dhūpam ca arpayāmi tatas vadet yaṃ raṃ laṃ vaṃ haṃ iti ca puṣpa añjalim atha arpayet evam pūjām vidhāya atha ca ante mudrāḥ pradarśayet dhyāyet tu manasā devīm mantram uccārayet śanais na kampayet śiras grīvām dantān na eva prakāśayet eva daśa vāram aśaktaḥ vā na atas yūnam kadācana yatas sā agnimukhī proktā iti āhuḥ kecid mahā ṛṣayaḥ surabhiḥ jñāna śūrpam ca kūrmaḥ yoniḥ ca pañkajam liṅgam nirvāṇakam ca eva japa ante aṣṭau pradarśayet tat sarvam kṣamyatām devi kaśyapa priya vādini atas bhūḥ iti uktvā ca ṛgveda puruṣam tarpayāmi ca pada ante itihāsa purāṇam iti īrayet tatas sarva āgamam ca eva puruṣam tarpayāmi ca satyam ca satya loka ākhyam puruṣam tarpayāmi ca bhūḥ ekapadām nāma gāyatrī tarpayāmi ca bhuvaḥ dvipadām gāyatrī tarpayāmi iti kīrtayet tripadām gāyatrīm tarpayāmi tatas vadet om bhūḥ bhuvaḥ ca svar ca iti gāyatra ca catuṣpadām uṣasīm ca eva gāyatrī sāvitrīm ca sarasvatīm vedānām mātaram pṛthvīm ajām ca eva tu kauśikī sāṃkṛti vai sārvajiti gāyatrī tarpaṇe vadet tarpaṇa ante ca śanti artham jātavedasam īrayet māna stoka iti mantram ca śānti artham prajapet sudhīḥ tatas api tryambakaḥ mantraḥ śānti arthaḥ parikīrtitaḥ atas devāḥ iti dvābhyām sarva aṅga sparśanam caret syonā pṛthivi mantreṇa bhūmyai kuryāt praṇāmakam evam vighānam saṃdhyāyāḥ prātaḥkāle prakīrtitam pañcāyatana pūjām ca tatas kuryāt samāhitaḥ śivām śivam gaṇapatim sūryam viṣṇum tathā arcayet pauruṣeṇa tu sūktena vyāhṛtyā vā samāhitaḥ mūlamantraṇa vā kṛyāt hrīḥ ca te iti mantrāt tu yajet madhye tathā īśānyām tu mādhavam āgneyyām girijānātham gaṇeśam rakṣasām diśi ṣoḍaśān upacārān ca ṣoḍaśabhiḥ haret naraḥ na devī pūjanāt puṇyam adhikam kvacid īkṣyate atas eva tu saṃdhyāsu saṃdhyā upāstiḥ śruti īritā na akṣataiḥ arcayet viṣṇum na tulasyā gaṇeśvaram mallikā jāti kusumam kuṭajam panasam tathā bakulam kundam lodhram tu karavīrakam śiśapā aparājitā puṣpam vandhūka agastyapuṣpake madanam sinduvāram ca pālāśa kusumam tathā tathā hallakī mādhavī puṣpam arka mandāra puṣpakam tathā tad evamādīni puṣpāṇi devī priya karāṇi ca kṛtvā ittham devatā pūjām tatas mūlamanum japet evam pūjām samāpya eva veda abhyāsam caret budhaḥ tatas svavṛttyā kurvīta poṣya varga artha sādhanam tṛtīya dina bhāge tu niyamena vicakṣaṇaḥ iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skaṃdhe saptadaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca pūjā viśeṣam śrī devyāḥ śrotum icchāmi mānadaiḥ manujaḥ kṛtakṛtya tvam āvahet śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca tad sākṣāt samasta āpad nivāraṇam deva ṛṣe śṛṇu vakṣyāmi śrī mātuḥ pūjana kramam bhukti mukti pradam ṣaḍaṅganyāsam ācaret maunī saṃkalpya bhūtaśuddhayā ādikam caret maṅkhasya sthāpanam kṛtvā sāmānyāvyam vidhāya ca pūjā dravyāṇi ca astreṇa prokṣayet matimān naraḥ guroḥ anujñām ādāya tatas pūjām samārabhet pīṭha pūjām purā kṛtvā deva om dhyāyet tatas param mad āsana ādi upacāraiḥ ca bhakti prema yutām sadā snāpayet para devīm tām pañcāmṛta rasa ādibhiḥ pauṇḍra ikṣu rasa pūrṇaḥ tu kalaśam śata saṃkhyakaiḥ snāpayet yaḥ maheśānaiḥ om na saḥ bhūyas abhijāyate yaḥ ca cūta rasaiḥ evam snāpavet jagadantrikām veda nārāyaṇam kṛtvā veda pārāyaṇam raseṇa ikṣu udbhavena vā caran abhipice maheśānī sa kuṭumbaḥ nara uttamaḥ karpūra aguru kāśmīra kastūrī paṅka paṅkilaiḥ salilaiḥ snāpayet devīm veda pārāyaṇam caran bhasmībhavanti pāpāni śata janma arjitāni ca yaḥ dugdha kalaśaiḥ devīm snāpayet apāṭhāt nityam tasmin vai kṣīrasāgare madhunā ca ghṛtena eva tathā śaṃkarayā api ca ratna nirmita bhūṣāṇām dātā nidhipatiḥ bhavet pāśmīra candanam dattvā kastūrī vibhūṣitam indrāsane samārūḍhaḥ bhavet devapatiḥ paraḥ puṣpāṇi vividhāni āhuḥ pūjā karmaṇi sādhavaḥ tāni dattvā yathālābham kailāsam labhate svayam māyā bīja trayam yatnāt su sphuṭam ca ati sundaram nāma caturthī atas samuccaret namas antam parayā bhaktyā devī caraṇa paṅkaje yaḥ tu koṭi daleḥ evam lulitaiḥ aṣṭa gandhāt pūjayet bhuvaneśānīm brahmāṇḍa adhipatiḥ bhavet kunda puṣpaiḥ navanaiḥ tu pūjayet tu prājāpatyam labhet dhruvam mallikā mālatī puṣpaiḥ aṣṭa gandhena lolitaiḥ koṭi saṃkhyaiḥ pūjayā tu jāyate sa caturmukhaḥ dāḍima kusumasya api vidhiḥ eṣa udīritaḥ evam anyāni puṣpāṇi śrī devyai vidhinā arpayet tasya puṇya phalasya antam na jānāti īśvaraḥ api saḥ tad tad ṛta dbhavaiḥ puṣpaiḥ nāma sāhasra saṃkhyayā yaḥ evam kurute bhaktyā mahāpātaka saṃyutaḥ hānte deha ante śrī pada ambhojam durlabham deva sattamaiḥ prāpnoti sādhaka varaḥ mune na asti atra saṃśayaḥ dhūpam dadyāt mahādevyai yena syāt dhūpitam gṛham dīpa karpūra khaṇḍeḥ ca dadyāt devyai nirantaram sūrya lokam avāpnoti na atra kāryā vicāraṇā śata dīpān tathā dadyāt sahasrān vā samāhitaḥ leīśvoyaiḥ tathā peyaiḥ ṣaṣ rasaiḥ tu samāhitaiḥ phalāni divyāni svādūni rasavanti ca tṛptāyām śrī mahādevyām bhavet tṛptam jagattrayam tatas pānīyakam dadyāt śubham gaṅgā jalam mahat bhairava vālā saṃyuktam śītalam kalaśa sthitam tāmbūlam ca tatas devyai karpūra śakala anvitam mṛdaṅga vīṇā muraja ḍhakkā dundubhi niḥsvanaiḥ toṣayet jagantām dhātrīm gāyanaiḥ ati mohanaiḥ ṣaṣ pārāyaṇaiḥ stotraiḥ purāṇa ādibhiḥ api uta pradakṣiṇām namaskāram kuryāt devyāḥ anekadhā kṣamāpayet jagaddhātrīm jagadambām muhur muhur sakṛt smaraṇa mātreṇa yatra devī prasīdati etādṛśa upacāraiḥ ca prasīdet atra kaḥ smayaḥ svabhāvāt bhavet mātā putre ati karuṇāvatī tena bhaktau kṛtāyām tu vaktavyam kim tatas param atra te kathayiṣyāmi purāvṛttam sanātanam bhraman nānāvidhān deśān yayau kāśi puram prati anna pūrṇā mahāsthāne prārabdha vaśāt dvijaḥ ma gama līlayā tatra kaṇa lobhāt anātha vat matvā pradakṣiṇām ekām jagāma sa vihāyasā deśa antaram vihāya eva purī mukti pradāyinīm prati bṛhadratha iti nāmnā abhūt prasiddhaḥ kṣiti maṇḍale mahā yajvā dhārmikaḥ ca satya vādī jita indriyaḥ iti śrutvā kiṃvadantī munayaḥ samupāgatāḥ kṛta ātithyāḥ viṣṭareṣu ūṣuḥ eva te indreṇa tri kāla jñānam eva api kasmāt puṇya prabhāvāt jñānam tava iti tat jñātum āgatāḥ sma te antikam vada nirvyājayā vṛttyā tat naḥ yathātatham śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca iti teṣām vacaḥ śrutvā rājā parama dhārmikaḥ uvāca sakalam brahman tri kāla jñāna kāraṇam śrūyatām munayaḥ sarve mama jñānasya kāraṇam cakravākaḥ sthitaḥ pūrvam noca yoni gataḥ api vā ajñānāt api kṛtavan annapūrṇā pradakṣiṇām tri kāla jñāna tā api asmin abhūt janmani suvratāḥ tad mahimānam tu patantyaiḥ bhrūṇi mama aniśam hik astu janma teṣām vai kṛtaghnān ātu pāpinām ye sarva mātaram devīm sva upāsyām na bhajanti hi na śiva upāsanā nityā na viṣṇu upāsanā tathā nitya upāstiḥ parā devyāḥ nityā śrutyā eva coditā kim mayā bahu vaktavyam sthāne saṃśaya vajite sevanīyam pada ambhojam nirantaram na atas parataram kiṃcid adhikam jagatī tale sevanīyā parā devī nirguṇā sa guṇā athavā śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca iti tasya vacaḥ śrutvā rājarṣeḥ dhārmikasya ca evam prabhāvā sā devī tad pūjāyāḥ phalam kiyat yeṣām tu janma sāphalyam teṣām śraddhā prajāyate yeṣām tu janma aṃkaryam teṣām śraddhā na jāyate iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe aṣṭādaśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca atha atas śrūyatām brahman saṃdhyām mādhyāhnikīm śubhām yad anuṣṭhānāt apūrvam jāyate atyuttamam phalam sāvitrīm yuvatīm śveta varṇām ca eva tri locanām hastakām māyām namāmi aham dhyātvā ācamana ādi ca pūrvavat atha ca arghya prakaraṇam puṣpāṇi cinuyāt tatas ūrdhvam ca sūrya abhimukham kṣiptvā arghyam pratipādayet prātar saṃdhyā ādi vat sarvam upasaṃhāra pūrvakam asaṃpradāyam tatvara kārya hāniḥ tu jāyate pāraṇam saṃdhyayoḥ ca atra maṃdeha nāma rākṣasāḥ bhakṣitum sūryam iccham kāraṇam śruti coditam atas tu kāraṇāt vipraḥ saṃdhyām kuryāt prayatnāt ambhaḥ tu prakṣipet tena na anyathā śruti ghātakaḥ mantreṇa puṣpaiḥ vā arghyam dadyāt prayatnena sa aṅgam saṃdhyā phalam labhet atra eva tarpaṇam vakṣye śṛṇu devaṣi sattamaiḥ bhuvaḥ punar pūrupam tu tarpayāmi namaḥ namaḥ yajurvedam tarpayāmi maṇḍalam tarpayāmi ca hiraṇyagarbham ca tathā antarātmānam tathā eva ca sāvitrīm ca tatas vedamātaram sāṃkṛti tathā saṃdhyām tathā eva yuvatīm rudrāṇī nīmṛjām tathā sarva arthānām siddhi karām sarva mantra artha siddhām bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar pūrupam tu iti madhya āhṛ arpaṇam citram devānām iti ca sūrya upasthānam ācaret japasya api prakāram tu vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nāradaiḥ prātar sāyam ca aghas karau tathā parva dvayam anāmikyāḥ kaniṣṭhā ādi krameṇa tu tarjanī mūla paryantam karamālā prakīrtitā brahma sva kṣetra hārī ca yaḥ ca vipraḥ surām pivet sa gāyatryāḥ sahasreṇa pūtaḥ bhavati mānavaḥ mānasam vācikam pāpam viṣaya indriya saṅga jam tad kilbiṣam nāśayati trīṇi janmāni mānavaḥ jānāti vedānām ca āvṛtyāḥ tadvat gāyatrī japaḥ uttamaḥ iti madhyāhna saṃdhyāyāḥ prakāraḥ kīrtitaḥ mayā iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe ekonaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca upaspṛśet savya pāṇi pādau ca prokṣayet tatas śirasi cakṣuṣi tathā nāsāyām śrotra deśake hṛdaye ca tathā maulo prokṣaṇam samyak ācaret dvau darbhau om dakṣiṇe haste vāme sakṛt upavīte śikhāyām ca pāda mūle sakṛt sakṛt tris japet pūrvam ca agnim īḍe tatas param atha atas saṃhitāyāḥ ca vidā maghavan iti api agne āyāhi ca iti evam śat naḥ devīḥ iti iti ca atha śikṣām pravakṣyāmi pañca saṃvatsara iti ca tarpaṇam ca eva devānām tatas kuryāt pradakṣiṇam prajāpatiḥ ca brahmā ca vedāḥ devāḥ tathā ṛṣayaḥ sarvāṇi ca eva chandāṃsi tathā uṃkāraḥ tathā eva ca ca gāyatrī ca eva yajñāḥ ca dyāvāpṛthivī iti api tu ahorātrāṇi ca sāṃkhyāḥ atas param nāgāḥ vayāṃsi gāvaḥ aśva sādhyāḥ viprāḥ tathā eva ca yakṣāḥ rakṣāṃsi bhūtāni iti evam antāni kīrtayet atha u bhūtvā ca ṛṣīn saṃtarpayet api ca kṣudra sūktāḥ mahā sūktāḥ sanakaḥ ca sanandanaḥ maṃcaśīrṣakaḥ prācīnāvītinā tat ca kartavyam atha tarpaṇam bhāṣya bhārata pūrvam ca mahābhārataḥ iti api dharma ācāryāḥ ime sarve tṛpyantu iti ca kīrtayet jānanti bāhavi gārgya gautamāḥ ca eva śākalaḥ eva bhairavam mahākauṣītakam vai tarpayet tatas bhāradvājam ca paiṃgyam ca mahāpaigyam suyajñakam bāṣkalam śākalam ca eva sujāta vakram eva ca saujāmi śaunakam ca āśvalāyanam ye ca anye sarve ācāryāḥ te sarve tṛptim āpnuyuḥ ye ke ca mad kule jātāḥ aputrāḥ gotriṇaḥ mṛtāḥ te gṛhṇantu mayā dattam vastra niṣpīḍana udakam sarva vedānta pāṭhasya phalam āpnoti sādhakaḥ baiśvadevam tatas kuryāt nitya śrāddham tathā eva ca go grāsam ca tatas dattvā bhuñjīta brāhmaṇaiḥ saha itihāsa purāṇa ādyaḥ ṣaṣṭha sattamakau nayet aṣṭamā lokayātrā tu vahis saṃdhyām tatas punar atha sāyaṃtanām saṃdhyām pravakṣyāmi mahā mune yad anuṣṭhāna mātreṇa mahāmāyā prasīdati bhācamya prāṇanā āyamya sādhakaḥ sthira mānasaḥ śruti smṛti ādi karma ādau sa garbhaḥ prāṇasaṃyamaḥ tu saḥ ca amantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ bhūtaśuddhayā ādikam kṛtvā na anyathā karma kītitam sa lakṣaḥ devatām dhyātvā pūra kumbhaka recakaiḥ dhyānam prakuryāt saṃdhyāyām sāyaṃkāle vicakṣaṇaḥ vṛddhām sarasvatīm devīm kṛṣṇa aṅgoṃ kṛṣṇa vāsasam śaṅkha cakra gadā padma hastām garuḍa vāhanām nānā ratna lasat bhūṣām kvaṇat mañjīra mekhalām ratna mukuṭām tāra hāra āvali yutām tāṭaṅka baddha māṇikya kānti śobhi kapolakām pīta ambara dharām devīm saṃcidānanda rūpiṇīm sāmavedena sahitām saṃyutām sattva vartmanā māvāhayāmi aham devīm āyānt sūrya maṇḍalāt evam dhyātvā ca tām devīm saṃdhyā saṃkalpam ācaret arghyam dadyāt ca sūryāya sādhakaḥ śuddha mānasaḥ ubhau pādau samau kṛtvā haste dhṛtvā jala añjalim devam dhyātvā maṇḍala stham tatas kramāt tu yaḥ nīre mūḍha ātmā jñāna varjitaḥ smṛti mantrān ca prāyaścittī bhūyāt vijaḥ tatas sūryam upasthāya api asau āditya mantrāt gāyatryāḥ ca japam kuryāt upaviśya tatas bṛsīm sahasram vā tad ardham vā śrī devī dhyāna pūrvakam sāyam saṃdhyā tarpaṇe ca krameṇa parikīrtayet ṛṣiḥ eva atra sarasvatyāḥ prakīrtitaḥ devatā viṣṇu rūpā sā chandaḥ ca eva sarasvatī viniyogakaḥ maṇḍalam ca iti saṃprocya hiraṇyagarbhakam tathā saṃdhyām vṛddhām tathā viṣṇu rūpiṇīm upasīm tathā nimṛjīm ca tathā sarva siddhīnām kāriṇīm tathā sarva mantra adhipatikām bhūḥ bhuvaḥ svar ca pūruṣam iti evam tarpaṇam kāryam saṃdhyāyāḥ śruti saṃmatam sāyam saṃtryā vidhānam ca kathitam pāpa nāśanam sarva duḥkha hanam vyādhi nāśakam mokṣa dam tathā sat ācāreṣu saṃdhyāyāḥ prādhānyam muni puṃgavaiḥ saṃdhyā caraṇāt devī bhakta abhīṣṭam prayacchati iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe viṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca atha atas śrūyatām brahman gāyatryāḥ pāpa nāśanam puraścaraṇakam puṇyam yathā iṣṭa phala dāyakam parvata agre nadī tīre bilva mūle jalāśaye puraścaraṇa kṛt mantrī sidhyati eva na saṃśayaḥ nṛsiṃhāvarāhānām tāṃtrikam vaidikam tathā sarve śāktāḥ dvijāḥ proktāḥ na śaivāḥ na ca vaiṣṇavāḥ ādiśaktim upāsate gāyatrī vedamātrīm mantra śodhana pūrva aṅgam ātma śodhanam uttamam binā kartuḥ japa homa ādikāḥ kriyāḥ niṣphalāḥ tāḥ tu vijñeyāḥ kāraṇam śruti coditam tapasā tāpayet deham pitṛn devān ca tarpayet taret āpadaḥ ātmanaḥ mad śarīra śoṣaṇam prāhuḥ tāpasāḥ tapaḥ uttamam mārgeṇa kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa ādibhiḥ atha annaśuddhi karaṇam vakṣyāmi śṛṇu nāradaiḥ a yācita uñcha śukla ākhya bhikṣā vṛtti catuṣṭayam bhikṣānam śuddham ānīya kṛtvā bhāga catuṣṭayam āśramasya yayā yasya kṛtvā grāsa vidhi kramāt pañca kṣiptvā tu go mūtram yathāśakti yathākramam tad ūrdhvam grāsa saṃkhyā syāt vānaprastha gṛhasthayoḥ tu grāsamānam vidhīyate brahmacārī yatheṣṭam ca go mūtram vidhi pūrvakam prokṣaṇam nava vāram ca ṣaṣ vāram ca tri vārakam niśchidram ca karam kṛtvā sāvitrīm ca tat iti ṛcam cauraḥ vā yadi cāṇḍālaḥ vaiśyaḥ kṣatraḥ tathā eva ca śūdra annam śūdra samparkaiḥ śūdreṇa ca saha aśanam te yānti narakam ghoram yāvat candra divākarau gāyatrī chandaḥ mantrasya yathā saṃkhyā akṣarāṇi ca tāvat lakṣāṇi kartavyam puraścaraṇakam tathā tu viśvāmitra matam tathā jīva hīnaḥ yathā dehaḥ sarva karmasu na kṣamaḥ puraścaraṇa hīnaḥ tu tathā mantraḥ prakīrtitaḥ jyeṣṭha āṣāḍhaḥ bhādrapadam pauṣam tu malamāsakam aṅgāra śanivāram ca vyatipātam ca vaidhṛtim aṣṭamī navamīm ṣaṣṭhīm caturthī ca trayodaśīm caturdaśīm amāvāsyām pradoṣam ca tathā niśām sarvāṇi etāni varjyāni puraścaraṇa karmaṇi candra tārā anukūle ca śuklapakṣe viśeṣataḥ puraścaraṇakam kuryāt mantra siddhiḥ prajāyate svastivācanakam kuryāt nāndīśrāddham yathāvidhi ārabhet tu tatas paścāt anujñāna puraḥsaram bhāsī purī ca kedāraḥ mahākālaḥ atha nāsikam tryambakam ca mahā kṣetram pañca dīpāḥ ime bhuvi na nyūnam na atiriktam ca japam kuryāt dine dine nairantaryeṇa kurvanti puraścaryām muni īśvarāḥ manaḥ saṃharaṇam śaucam dhyānam mantra artha cintanam gāyatrī chandī mantrasya yathā saṃkhyā akṣarāṇi ca tāvat lakṣāṇi kartavyam puraścaraṇakam tathā tad daśa aṅgena sa ghṛtena payas andhasā tilaiḥ pattraḥ prasūnaiḥ ca yavaiḥ ca madhura anvitaiḥ kuryāt daśa aṃśāt homam tatas siddhaḥ bhavet manuḥ gāyatrī ca eva saṃsevyā dharma kāma artha mokṣa dā madhyāhne mita bhuj maunī tris snāna arcana tatparaḥ jale lakṣa trayam sa kriyaḥ japet paścāt api sāmānya kāmya karma ādī yathāvat vidhiḥ ucyate ṣaṣ māsam vā tri māsam vā varṣa anta siddhim āpnuyāt padmānām lakṣa homena dhṛta antānām hata aśane prāpnoti nikhilam mokṣam sidhyati eva na saṃśayaḥ mantra siddhi vinā kartuḥ japa homa ādikāḥ kriyāḥ tat kāmyam vā yadi vā mokṣaḥ sarvam tat niṣphalam bhavet pañcaviṃśati lakṣeṇa dadhinā kṣīreṇa vā hṛtāt sva dehe sidhyate jantuḥ mahā ṛṣīṇām matam yathā aṣṭāṅga yoga siddhyā ca naraḥ prāpnoti yat phalam tat phalam siddhim āpnoti na atra kāryā vicāraṇā mad śaktaḥ vā api tu aśaktaḥ vā āhāram niyatam caret paṣṭ māsāt tasya siddhiḥ syāt guru bhakti rataḥ sadā eka aham pañcagavya āśī kā mama mārutāśanaḥ eka aham brāhmaṇa anna āśī gāyatrī japa kṛt bhavet snātvā gaṅgā ādi tīrtheṣu śatam antar jale japet śatena apaḥ tatas pītvā sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate cāndrāyaṇa ādi kṛcchrasya phalam prāpnoti niścitam rājā vā yadi vā vipraḥ tapaḥ kuryāt svake gṛhe gṛhasthaḥ brahmacārī vā vānaprasthaḥ athavā api ca śrauta smārta ādikam karma kriyate mokṣa kāṃkṣibhiḥ sa agnikaḥ ca sat ācāraḥ vidvobhiḥ ca su śikṣitaḥ bhikṣā annam śuddham aśnīyāt aṣṭau grāsān svayam bhujet evam puraścaraṇakam kṛtvā mantra siddhim avāpnuyāt hema ṛṣe yad anuṣṭhānāt dāridrayam vilayam vrajet tat śrutvā api ca puṇyānām mahatīm siddhim āpnuyāt iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe ekaviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ mama api smṛtim āgatam manuṣyasya yajñaḥ ca eva tu pañcamaḥ atha atas śrūyatām brahman vaiśvadeva vidhānakam puras caryā prasaṅgeṇa as pañca sūnā gṛhasthasya cullaḥ peṣaṇī upaskaraḥ paṇḍaṇī ca uda kumbhaḥ ca teṣām sthaṇḍile api vā vaiśvadevam prakurvīta kuṇḍe vā vyajāyata na pāṇinā na śūrpeṇa na ca medhya ajina ādibhiḥ mukhena upadhamet agni mukhāt eva puṭakena bhavet vayādhiḥ śūrpeṇa dhana nāśanam kuryāt mūla śāka udaka ādibhiḥ alābhe yena kena api kāṣṭha mūla tṛṇa ādibhiḥ dadhi āktam vā pāyasa aktam tad abhāve ambhasā api vā śuṣkaiḥ paryuṣitaiḥ kuṣṭhī ucchiṣṭena dviṣām vaśī rukṣaiḥ draridra tām yāti kṣāram hutvā vrajati adhas aṅgārān bhasma miśrān tu nirhṛtya uttaratas analāt huyāt vaiśvadevam tu na kṣāra ādi vimiśritam a kṛtvā vaiśvadevam tu yaḥ bhuṃkte mūḍha dhī dvijaḥ sa mūḍhaḥ narakam yāti kālasūtram avākśirāḥ śākam vā yadi vā patram mūlam vā yadi vā phalam saṃkalpayet yat āhāram tena agnau juhuyāt api akṛte vaiśvadeve tu bhikṣaḥ bhikṣā artham āgate uddhṛtya vaiśvadeva artham bhikṣām dattvā visarjayet na tu bhikṣu kṛtam doṣam vaiśvadevaḥ vyapohati yatiḥ ca brahmacārī ca pakva anna svāminau ubhau maiśvādeva anantaram ca gogrāsam pratipādayet tad vidhānam pravakṣyāmi śṛṇu deva ṛṣi pūjitaiḥ surabhiḥ veṣṇavī mātā nityam viṣṇu pade sthitā pratigṛhyatām gobhyaḥ ca namaḥ iti eva pūjām kṛtvā gave arpayet go grāsena tu gomātā surabhiḥ saṃprasīdati tu tatas godohanam kālam tiṣṭhet ca eva gṛha aṃgaṇe sa tasmai duṣkṛtam dattvā puṇyam ādāya gacchati mātā pitā guruḥ bhrātā prajāḥ dāsaḥ samāśritaḥ abhyāgataḥ atithiḥ ca agniḥ ete poṣyāḥ udāhṛtāḥ evam jñātvā tu yaḥ mohāt na karoti gṛhāśramam atha prāṇa agnihotram tu vakṣyāmi muni puṃgavaiḥ ca jñātvā mucyate jantuḥ janma mṛtyu jarā ādibhiḥ parijñānena mucyaṃte narāḥ pātaka kilbiṣaiḥ tarjanī madhyamā aṅguṣṭhaiḥ udānasya āhuti kṣipet madhyamā anāmikām guṣṭhaiḥ apānasya āhuti kṣipet kaniṣṭhā anāmikā aṅguṣṭhaiḥ vyānasya tat anantaram kaniṣṭhā tarjanī aṅguṣṭhaiḥ udānaḥ kṣipet sarva aṅgulaiḥ gṛhītvā annam samānasya āhuti kṣipet svāhā antān praṇava ādyān ca nāma mantrān ca vai paṭhet nābhī ca dakṣiṇāgniḥ syāt adhas sabhya āvasathyakau hotā prāṇaḥ udgātā cakṣuḥ adhvaryuḥ eva ca ahaṃkāraḥ paśuḥ ca atra praṇavaḥ payaḥ īritam buddhiḥ ca patnī saṃproktā yad adhīnaḥ gṛhāśramī prāṇamantrasya ca ṛṣiḥ rukmavarṇaḥ kṣudhāgnikaḥ prāṇāya ca tathā svāhā mantra ante kīrtayet api apāna mantrasya tathā go kṣīra dhavala ākṛtiḥ śraddhā agni ṛṣiḥ eva atra somaḥ vai devatā smṛtā uṣṇih chandaḥ tathā apānāya svāhā iti api kīrtayet ca ṛṣiḥ utaḥ devatā agniḥ anuṣṭubh chandaḥ īritam ca tathā na iti api ṛṣiḥ agniḥ samākhyātaḥ vāyuḥ ve devatā smṛtaḥ bṛhatī chandaḥ ākhyātam udānāya ca pūrvavat ṛṣiḥ agniḥ samākhyātaḥ parjanyaḥ devatā mataḥ paṅkti chadaḥ samākhyātam samānāya ca pūrvavat parjanyāyāya idam iti uktvā ṣaṣṭhām ca eva āhuti kṣipet vaiśvānaraḥ mahān agniḥ ṛṣi parikīrtitaḥ ākhyātam tu bhavet api svāhā antaḥ mantraḥ ākhyātaḥ paramātmane uccaret idam na mama ca iti evam jātam prāṇa agnihotrakam etat jñātvā vidhi kṛtvā brahma bhūyāya kalpate prāṇa agnihotra vidyā iyam saṃkṣepāt kathitā hi te iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe dvāviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha trayoviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca amṛtāpidhānam iti evam uccārya sādhaka uttamaḥ ucchiṣṭa bhāgbhyaḥ pātrānam dadyāt ate vicakṣaṇaḥ ye ke ca mad kule jātāḥ dāsa dāsyaḥ anna kāṃkṣiṇaḥ te sarve tṛptim āyāṃtu mayā dattena bhū tale tu nikṣipet yaḥ tu saḥ vipraḥ paṅkti dūṣakaḥ ucchiṣṭaḥ tena saṃspṛṣṭaḥ śvanā śūdreṇa ca dvijaḥ upoṣya rajanīm ekām pañcagavyena śudhyati anucchiṣṭena saṃspṛṣṭaḥ snānam eva vidhīyate pañcabhiḥ pañca koṭīnām tat ananta phalam smṛtam laghum iṣṭa hita āśī ca vinītaḥ śānta cetasā nityam triṣavaṇa snāyī nityam sa śubha bhāṣaṇaḥ strī śūdra patita vrātya nāstika ucchiṣṭa bhāṣaṇam cāṇḍāla bhāṣaṇam ca eva na kuryāt muni sattamaiḥ natvā na eva ca bhāṣeta japa homa arcana ādiṣu tat tat tat sarva avasthāsu sarvadā bhāratusnāteṣu dāreṣu saṃgatiḥ yā vidhānāt saṃskṛtāyām savarṇāyām ṛtum dṛṣṭvā prayatnāt ṛṇa trayam a saṃśodhya tu an utpādya sutān api tathā yajñān aniṣṭhā ca mokṣam icchan rajati adhas atas kāryam tu vipra indraiḥ ṛṇa traya viśodhanam te devānām ṛpīṇām ca pitṝṇām ṛṇinaḥ tathā phala āśī vā śāka āśī vā haviṣya bhuj bhikṣā āśī vā japet vidvāḥ kṛcchra cāndrāyaṇa ādi kṛt lavaṇam kṣāram amlam ca guñjana kāṃsya bhojanam tāmbūlam ca dvi bhuktam ca duṣṭa vāsaḥ pramattanam vṛthak na kālam gamayet yūta strī sva apavādāt nityam triṣavaṇa snānam śūdra karma vivarjanam nitya pūjā nitya dānam ānanda stuti kīrtanam snāna pūjā japa dhyāna homa tarpaṇa tatparaḥ niṣkāmaḥ devatāyām ca sarva karma nivedakaḥ evamādīn ca niyamān puraścaraṇa kṛt caret tasmāt vijaḥ prasanna ātmā japa homa parāyaṇaḥ vidveṣaṇam saṃharaṇam māraṇam roga nāśanam yena yena atha ṛṣiṇā yad artham devatāḥ stutāḥ sa sa kāmaḥ teṣām teṣām tathā tathā tāni karmāṇi vakṣyāmi vidhānāni ca karmaṇām puraścaraṇam ādau ca karmaṇām siddhi kārakam svādhyāya abhyamana syādī prājāpatyam caret vijaḥ keśa śmaśru loma nakhān vāpayitvā tatas śuciḥ tiṣṭhet ahani rātrau tu śuciḥ āsīta vāgyataḥ satya vādī pavitrāṇi japet vayāhṛtayaḥ tathā oṃkāra ādyāḥ tu tāḥ japtvā sāvitrīm ca tat iti ṛcam mā apohiṣṭhā iti sūktam ca pavitram pāpa nāśanam ā sahasrāt ā śatāt vā api ā daśāt athavā japet oṃkāram vyāhṛtīḥ tisraḥ sāvitrīm athavā ayutam tarpayitvā adbhiḥ ācāryān ṛṣīn chandāṃsi devatāḥ anāryeṇa na bhāṣeta śūdreṇa api na garhitaiḥ na deva brāhmaṇa dviṣṭar na ācārya guru nindakaḥ na mātṛ pitṛ vidviṣṭena vimanyeta kañcana parākasya ca kṛcchrasya vidhi śvāndrāyaṇasya ca pañcabhiḥ pātakaiḥ sarvaiḥ duṣkṛtaiḥ ca pramucyate taptakṛcchreṇa sarvāṇi pāpāni dahati kṣaṇāt tribhiḥ cāndrāyaṇaiḥ pūtaḥ brahma lokam samaśnute taiḥ aṣṭabhiḥ devatāḥ sākṣāt paśyeta vara dāḥ tadā chandāṃsi daśabhiḥ jñātvā sarvān kāmān samaśnute tri aham prātar tri aham sāyam tri aham adyāt a yācitam tri aham param ca na aśnīyāt prājāpatyam caret vijaḥ eka rātra upavāsaḥ ca kṛncham sāṃtapanam smṛtam pūrvavat evam eva tribhiḥ yuktam mahāsāṃtapanam smṛtam pratitryaham pivet uṣṇān sakṛt snāyo samāhitaḥ niyataḥ tu pibet apaḥ prājāpatya vidhiḥ smṛtaḥ parākaḥ nāma kṛcchraḥ ayam sarva pāpa praṇodanaḥ ekaikam tu grasepiḍam kṛṣṇe śukle ca vardhayet amāvāsyām na bhuñjīta evam cāndrāyaṇe vidhiḥ upaspṛśya triṣavaṇam etat cāndrāyaṇam smṛtam caturaḥ prātar aśnīyāt vipraḥ piṇḍān kṛta āhnikaḥ caturaḥ astam ite sūrye śiśucāndrāyaṇam smṛtam ca aṣṭau aṣṭau samaśnīyāt ā piṇḍāt madhyam dine sthite niyata ātmā haviṣyasya yaticāndrāyaṇam vratam tvac asṛj piśita asthīni medas majjā vasāḥ tathā madhu rātreṇa śuddhi ati eva na saṃśayaḥ yaiḥ karma kurvīta nityaśas evam śuddhasya karmāṇi siddhayanti eva na saṃśayaḥ muddha ātmā karma kurvīta satya vādī jita indriyaḥ iṣṭān kāmān tatas sarvān saṃprāpnoti na saṃśayaḥ trīṇi naktāni vā kuryāt tatas karma samārabhet puraścaryā sarva kāma pradāyinī kathitā te deva ṛṣe mahā pāpa vināśinī mantrī deha śodhana kārakam etat parasmai naḥ vācyam śruti sāram yatas smṛtam iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe trayoviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha caturviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca nārāyaṇa mahābhāga gāyatryāḥ tu samāsatas śānti ādikān prayogān tu vadasva karuṇā nidhe śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca na kasya api ca vaktavyam duṣṭāya piśunāya ca ati guhyam idam pṛṣṭam tvayā ati śāntiḥ payaḥ uktābhiḥ samidbhiḥ juhuyāt vijaḥ madhu samidbhiḥ śāmyanti bhūta roga graha ādayaḥ bhūta roga ādi śāntaye huyāt śakalaiḥ vā api malena tarpayet sūryam pāṇibhyām śāntim āpnuyāt jānu daghne jale japtvā sarvān doṣān mama nayet mucyet prāṇāṃtikāt bhayāt sarvebhyaḥ śānti karmabhyaḥ nimajjya apsu japaḥ smṛtaḥ sauvarṇe rājate vā api pātre tāmra maye api vā tad kṣīravṛkṣa maye vā api nirvaṇe mṛd maye api vā tad kṣīravṛkṣa mayaiḥ kāṣṭhaiḥ śeṣam saṃpādayet śanais tam prokṣayet eśam kuśa mantram anusmaran pratyāhuti spṛśan japtvā sahasram pātra saṃsthitam abhicāra samutpannām kṛtvā pāpam ca naśyati deva bhūta piśāca ādyāḥ yadi evam kurute vaśe gṛhyam grāmam puram rāṣṭram sarvam tebhyaḥ vimucyate maṇḍale śūlam ālikhya pūrva ukte ca krame api vā rājatam vā api kumbham tāmra mayam ca vā mṛd mayam vā navam divyam sūtra veṣṭitam avraṇam bhyaḥ āhṛtya tīrthāni catasṛbhyaḥ dvijottamaiḥ elā candana karpūra jātī pāṭala mallikāḥ bilva pattram tathā ākrāntām devīm vrīhi yavān tilān sarṣapān kṣīravṛkṣāṇām pravālāṇi ca nikṣiṣet snātaḥ samāhitaḥ vipraḥ sahasram mantrayet budhaḥ dikṣu saurān adhīyīran mantrān viprāḥ trayī vidaḥ prokṣayet pāyayet enam nīram tena abhiṣiṃcayet avaśyam kārayet vidvāḥ rājā dīgham jijīviṣuḥ gāvaḥ deyāḥ ca ṛtvigbhyaḥ abhiṣeke śatam mune dakṣiṇā yena vā puṣṭiḥ yathāśaktyā athavā bhavet guḍūcyāḥ parva vicchinnāḥ payaḥ ktā juhuyāt vijaḥ evam mṛtyuṃjayaḥ homaḥ sarva vyādhi vināśanaḥ vacābhiḥ payasā aktābhiḥ kṣayam hutvā vināśayet nivedya bhāskarāya annam pāyasam homa pūrvakam ca prāśayet āpnuyāt some sūryeṇa saṃyukte payaḥ uktāḥ kṣaya śāntaye kusumaiḥ śaṅkhavṛkṣasya hutvā kuṣṭham vināśayet tat tat tat tat tat prīravṛkṣa samidh homāt unmādaḥ api vinaśyati prameham śamayet hṛtvā madhunā ikṣu raseṇa vā hutvā nayet śānti masūrikām udumbara vaṭa aśvatthaiḥ go gaja aśva āmayam haret pipīli madhu valmīke gṛhe jāte śatam śatam mī samidbhiḥ annena sarpiṣā juhuyāt vijaḥ tad uttham śāntim āyāti śeṣaiḥ tatra bali haret sapta aham juhuyāt evam rāṣṭra rājyam sukhī bhavet yām diśam śata japtena lopṭena abhipratāḍayet bhūta roga viṣa ādibhyaḥ spṛśan japtvā vimocayet bhūma ādibhyaḥ vimucyeta jalam pītvā abhimantritam śatam bhasma nyaset bhūta ādi śāntaye hirasā dhārayet bhasma mantrayitvā tat iti ṛcā sarva vyādhi vinirmuktaḥ sukhī jīvet śatam samāḥ aśaktaḥ kārayet śānti vipram dattvā tu dakṣiṇām atha puṣṭi śriyam lakṣmī puṣpaiḥ hṛtvā āpnuyāt vijaḥ śrī kāmaḥ juhuyāt padmam raktaḥ śriyam avāpnuyāt hutvā śriyam avāpnoti jātī puṣpaiḥ navaiḥ śubhaiḥ homena śriyam āpnoti puṣkalām śriyam āpnoti paramām mūlasya śakalaiḥ api śatam śatam ca sapta aham hutvā śriyam avāpnuyāt raktotpala śatam hutvā sapta aham hem ca āpnuyāt sūryabimbe jalam hutvā jala stham hem ca āpnuyāt taiḥ karīṣa cūrṇaiḥ vatsasya hutvā paśum avāpnuyāt priyaṅgu pāyasa ājyaiḥ ca bhavet homa ādibhiḥ prajā nivedya bhāskarāya annam pāyasam homa pūrvakam bhojayet tat ṛtusnātām putram param avāpnuyāt brīhīṇām ca śatam hutvā hem ca āyuḥ avāpnuyāt suvarṇa kuḍmalam hutvā śatam āyuḥ avāpnuyāt dūrvābhiḥ payasā vā api madhunā sarpiṣā api vā śatam śatam ca sapta aham apamṛtyum vyapohati mā samidbhiḥ annena payasā vā ca sarpiṣā śatam śatam ca sapta aham apamṛtyum vyapohati śatam śatam ca sapta aham apamutyum vyapohati bhavet bhavet japet vitvam samāśritya māsam rājyam avāpnuyāt hutvā padma śatam māsam rājyam āpnoti akaṇṭakam yavāgūm grāmam āpnoti hutvā śāli samanvitam pāyasena śatam hutvā sapta aham vṛṣṭim āpnuyāt nābhi dadhne jale jalvā sapta aham dṛṣṭim āpnuyāt bhasma rātam hutvā mahā vṛṣṭi nivārayet palāśa kusumaiḥ hṛtvā sarvam iṣṭam avāpnuyāt avāpnuyāt pivet brāhmam rasam medhām avāpnuyāt lavaṇam madhu sammiśram hutvā iṣṭam vaśam ānayet nayet iṣṭam vaśam lakṣmī puṣpaiḥ madhu plutaiḥ matim ārogyam āyuṣyam agracam svāsthyam avāpnuyāt āyuṣkāmaḥ śucaḥ deśe prāpnuyāt āyuḥ uttamam hi āyus ārogya kāmaḥ tu jayet māsa dvayam dvijaḥ bhavet āyuṣyam ārogyam śriye sāma trayam japet āyuḥ śrī putra dāra ādyāḥ caturbhiḥ ca yaśaḥ japāt putra dāra āyuḥ ārogyam śriyam vidyām ca pañcabhiḥ eka pādaḥ japet ūrdhva bāhuḥ sthitvā nirāśrayaḥ māsam śata trayam tisraḥ sarvān kāmān avāpnuyāt evam śata uttaram japtvā sahasram sarvam āpnuyāt ruddhvā prāṇam apānam ca japet māsam śata trayam eka pādaḥ japet ūrdhva bāhuḥ ruddhvā anilam vaśī māsam śatam avāpnoti yat icchet iti kauśikaḥ evam śata trayam japtvā sahasram sarvam āpnuyāt nimajjya apsu japet na ayam śatam iṣṭam avāpnuyāt eva śata trayam jalvā sahasram sarvam āpnuyāt eka pādaḥ japet ūrdhva vāhaiḥ ruddhvā nirāśrayaḥ naktam aśnan haviṣyānnam vatsarāt ṛṣi tām iyāt japet bhagavān davaḥ catuḥ saṃvatsaram japet evam ṣaṣ vatsaram jalvā kāmarūpi tvam āpnuyāt ekādaśabhiḥ āpnoti prājāpatyam suva saraiḥ etena eva jitāḥ lokāḥ tapasā nārada ādibhiḥ ṛṣayaḥ pakṣam aśnanti kecid bhakṣyāvinaḥ ahani japet māsam tri sāhasram surāpaḥ śuddhim āpnuyāt māsam japet tri sāhasram śuciḥ syāt guru talpa gaḥ tri sahasram japet māsam kuṭīm kṛtvā vane vasan brahma hā mucyate pāpāt iti kauśika bhāṣitam dvādaśa aham nimajjya apsu sahasram pratyaham japet mucyeran aṃhasaḥ sarve mahāpātakinaḥ dvijāḥ tri sāhasram japet māsam prāṇān āyamya vāgyataḥ tad prāṇāyāma sahasreṇa brahma hā api viśudhyati tu abhyaset ūrdhvam prāṇa apānau samāhitaḥ sarva sahasram abhyaset māsam kṣitipaḥ śuci tām iyāt dvādaśa aham tri sāhasram japet hi go vadhe dvijaḥ daśa sāhasram abhyastā gāyatrī śodhayet vijam prāṇāyāma śatam kṛtvā mucyate sarva kilviṣāt sarveṣām eva pāpānām saṃkare sati śuddhaye caturviṃśati sāhasram abhyastā kṛcchra saṃjñitā catuḥṣaṣṭi sahasrāṇi cāndrāyaṇa mamāni tu śata kṛtvas abhyaset nityam prāṇān āyamya saṃdhyayoḥ dhyāyan devīm sūrya rūpām sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate iti te samyak ākhyātāḥ śāṃti śuddhayā ādi kalpanāḥ rahasya ati rahasyāḥ ca gopanīyāḥ tvayā sadā iti saṃkṣepāt proktaḥ sat ācārasya saṃgrahaḥ prasīdati iti uktam sarva śāstreṣu sat ācāra phalam mahat ācāravān sadā pūtaḥ sadā eva ācāravān sukhī hanyaḥ satyam satyam ca nāradaiḥ devī prasāda janakam sat ācāra vidhānakam yat api śṛṇuyāt martyaḥ mahā sampatti saukhya bhāj sat ācāreṇa aihika āmuṣmikam sukham iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe ekādaśa skandhe sadācāranirūpaṇam nāma caturviṃśaḥ adhyāyaḥ sārdhe rāma abdhi netra indu padyaiḥ vyāsa kṛtaiḥ śubhaiḥ devībhāgavatasya asya ekādaśaḥ skandhaḥ īritaḥ samāptaḥ ayam ekādaśaḥ skandhaḥ śrī gaṇeśāya namaḥ devībhāgavatam skandhaḥ uvāca tasya api atula māhātmyam sarva pāpa vināśanam śrutam bhavat mukha ambhāja cyutam deva akathā amṛtam ca dukha sādhyāni jānīmaḥ kartṛ asādhyāni tāni ca tat asmāt sāṃpratam yat tu sukha sādhyam śarīriṇām devī prasāda janakam śubha anuṣṭhāna siddhi dam tat karma vada mama svāmin kṛpā pūrvam sureśvaraiḥ sat ācāra vidhau gāyatrī vidhiḥ īritaḥ ye gāyatrī gatāḥ varṇaḥ tittva sakhyāḥ tvayā īritāḥ tepām ke ṛṣayaḥ proktāḥ kāni chandāṃsi te mune teṣām kāḥ devatāḥ proktāḥ sarvam kathaya mama prabho śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca kuryāt anyat na vā kuryāt anuṣṭhāna ādikam tathā bhavet saṃdhyāsu ca arghya dānam ca gāyavī japam eva ca nyāsāt karotu vā mā vā gāyatrīm eva ca abhyaset dhyātvā nirvyājayā vṛttyā saccidānanda rūpiṇīm hariśakaiḥ a kañja uttha sūrya candra hutāśanaiḥ atha atas śrūyatām bāmadevaḥ atriḥ vasiṣṭaḥ śukraḥ kaṇvaḥ parāśaraḥ viśvāmitraḥ mahā tejāḥ kapilaḥ śaunakaḥ mahān agastyaḥ kauśikaḥ vatsaḥ pulastyaḥ māṇḍukaḥ tathā durvāsāḥ tapasām śreṣṭhaḥ nāradaḥ kaśyapaḥ tathā iti ete ṛṣayaḥ proktāḥ varṇānām kramaśas mune ca eva ca triṣṭubham jagatī ca eva tathā atijagatī matā ca dhṛtiḥ ca atidhṛtiḥ tathā virāj prastāra paṃktiḥ ca kṛtiḥ prakṛtiḥ ākṛtiḥ ca iti etāni ca chandāṃsi kīrtitāni mahā mune daivatāni śṛṇu prājña tepām eva anupūrvaśas mad tṛtīyam ca tathā somyam īśānam ca caturthakam sāvitram pañcamam proktam paṣṭam āditya daivatam bārhaspatyam saptamam tu maitrāvaruṇam aṣṭamam tvāṣṭram ca dvādaśam smṛtam pauṣṇam dayodaśam proktam aindrāgnam ca caturdaśam māyavyam pañcadaśakam vāmadevyam ca ṣoḍaśam maitrāvaruṇi daivatyam proktam saptadaśa akṣaram baiṣṇavam viṃśatitamam vāsudaivatam īritam ekaviṃśati saṃkhyākam hāviśam rudra daivatam trayoviṃśam ca tattva saṃkhyakam caturviṃśati varṇānām devatānām ca saṃgrahaḥ kathitaḥ parama śreṣṭaḥ mahā pāpa eka śodhanaḥ labhet iti śrī devībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśa skandhe gāyatraḥ vicāroṃ nāma prathamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca varṇānām śaktayaḥ kāḥ ca tāḥ śṛṇuṣva mahā mune vāmadevī priyā satyā viśvā bhadra vilāsinī prabhāvatī jayā śāntā kāntā durgā sarasvatī ca viśālā īśā vyāpinī vimalā tathā tamas apahāriṇī sūkṣmā viśvayoniḥ jayā vaśā padmālayā parā śobhā bhadrā ca tripadā smṛtā caturviṃśati varṇānām śaktayaḥ samudāhṛtāḥ atas param varṇa varṇān vyāhāmi yathātatham capakam atasī puṣpa saṃnibham vidrumam tathā taruṇa āditya saṃkāśam śaṅkha kunda indu saṃnibham añjana ābham ca raktam ca vaiḍūryam kṣodra saṃnibham takī puṣpa saṃkāśam mallikā kusuma prabham iti pṛthivī apaḥ tathā tejaḥ vāyuḥ ākāśaḥ eva ca gandhaḥ rasaḥ ca rūpam ca śabdaḥ sparśaḥ tathā eva ca upastham pāyu pādam ca pāṇī vāc api ca kramāt prāṇam jihvā ca cakṣuḥ ca tvac śrotram ca tatas param prāṇaḥ apānaḥ tathā vyānaḥ samānaḥ ca tatas param tattvāni etāni varṇānām kramaśas kīrtitāni tu atas param pravakṣyāmi varṇa mudrāḥ krameṇa tu su mukham sampuṭam ca eva vitatam vistṛtam tathā mukha adhomukham ca eva vyāpaka añjalikam tathā mahā śakaṭam yama pāśam ca grathitam sammukha unmukham matsyam kūrmam varāhakam mudgaram pallavam tathā triśūla yoniḥ surabhiḥ ca akṣamālā ca ligakam ambujam ca mahāmudrāḥ turya rūpāḥ prakīrtitāḥ iti etāḥ kīrtitāḥ mudrāḥ varṇānām te mahā mune mahā pāpa caya karāḥ kīrti dāḥ kānti dāḥ mune iti śrī devībhāgavata mahāpurāṇe dvādaśa skandhe dvitīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca catuḥṣaṣṭi catuḥṣaṣṭi kalā abhijña pātakāt yoga vira dehaḥ ca devatā rūpaḥ mantra rūpaḥ viśeṣataḥ xchaṃdaḥ adhidaivam ca dhyānam ca vidhivat prabho śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca asti ekam paramam guhyam gāyatrīkavacam tathā paṭhanāt dhāraṇāt martyaḥ sarva pāpaiḥ pramucyate sarvān kāmān avāpnoti devī rūpaḥ ca jāyate gāyatrī kavacasya asya brahma viṣṇu maheśvarāḥ nārada brahma rūpā devatā uktā gāyatrī paramā kalā tad vījam bhargaḥ iti eṣā śaktiḥ uktā manoṣibhiḥ catubhiḥ hṛdayam proktam tribhiḥ varṇaiḥ śiraḥ smṛtam atha dhyānam pravakṣyāmi sādhaka ābhoṣṭa dāyakam tattva artha varṇa ātmakām gāyatrī pūrvatas pātu sāvitrī pātu dakṣiṇe pārvatī mama diśam rakṣet pāvakī jalaśāyinī yātudhānī diśam rakṣet yātudhāna bhayaṃkarā tā diśam rakṣet pavamāna vilāsinī diśam raudrī ca mama pātu rudrāṇī rudra rūpiṇī mama rakṣet adhastāt vaiṣṇavī tathā evam daśa diśaḥ rakṣet sarva aṅgam bhuvaneśvarī tat padam pātu mama pādī jaṅghe mama savituḥ padam padam ca mama netre naḥ pātu me padam śikhāyām me pracodayāt tad padam pātu mūrdhānam sakāraḥ pātu bhālakam cakṣuṣī tu vikāra arṇaḥ tukāraḥ tu kapolayoḥ nāsāpuṭam vakāra arṇaḥ rekāraḥ tu mukhe tathā mṇikāraḥ ūrdhvam oṣṭham tu yakāraḥ tu adhara uṣṭhakam madhye bhakāra arṇaḥ gakāra śvabuke tathā dekāraḥ kaṇṭha deśe tu vakāraḥ skandha deśakam syakāraḥ dakṣiṇam hastam dhīkāraḥ vāma hastakam makāraḥ hṛdayam rakṣet hikāraḥ udare tathā tu adhikāraḥ nābhi deśe tu yokāraḥ tu kaṭim tathā rakṣatu prakāraḥ jānunī rakṣet ca ukāraḥ jaṅghā deśakam takāraḥ vyañjanam ca eva sarva aṅge mama sadā avatu idam tu kavacam divyam bādhā śata vināśanam catuḥṣaṣṭi kalā vidyā dāyakam mokṣa kārakam iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśa skandhe gāyatrīmantrakavacam nāma tṛtīyaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca adhunā śrotum icchāmi gāyatrīhṛdayam param yad dhāraṇāt bhavet puṇyam gāyatrī japataḥ akhilam śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca devyāḥ ca hṛdayam proktam nāradātharvaṇe sphuṭam birā rūpām mahādevīm gāyatrī vedamātrīm dhyātvā tasyāḥ tu atha aṅgeṣu dhyāyet etāḥ devatāḥ piṇḍa brahmāṇḍayoḥ aikyāt bhāvayet sva tano tathā tatas abhedāya kāye sve bhāvayet devatāḥ imāḥ pūrva uktena prakāreṇa kuryāt aṅgāni paṭ kramāt dhyāyet atha artha nyāsaḥ daivatam danta paṅktau aśvinoḥ ubhe saṃdhye coṣṭhī agniḥ sarasvatī grīvāyām tu bṛhaspatiḥ stanayoḥ vasavaḥ aṣṭa marutaḥ parjanyaḥ mad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad ad mad a laye ūrū jānuvoḥ kauśikaḥ ayane pitaraḥ pādau muhūrtāni grahāḥ ṛtavaḥ saṃvatsarāḥ vai nimiṣam ahorātrau ādityaḥ candramāḥ pravarām divyām gāyatrī sahasra netrām śaraṇam aham prapadye mad savituḥ vareṇyāya namaḥ om tad pūrva ajayāya namaḥ tat prātar ādityāya tat prātar āditya pratiṣṭhāyai namaḥ tat prātar āditya pratiṣṭhāyai namaḥ prātar adhīyānaḥ rātri kṛtam pāpam nāśayati adhīyānaḥ divasa kṛtam pāpam nāśayati sāyam prātar adhas yānaḥ apāpaḥ bhavati sarva tīrtheṣu snātaḥ bhavati tat pūtaḥ bhavati a coṣya coṣaṇāt pūtaḥ bhavati a coṣya coṣaṇāt pūtaḥ bhavati a sādhya sādhanāt pūtaḥ bhavati śata bhavanti bhavanti mahīyate iti āha bhagavant śrī nārāyaṇaḥ iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśa skandhe gāyatrīhṛdayam nāma caturthaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha paṃcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca bhakta anukampin sarvajñaiḥ hṛdayam pāpa nāśanam gāyatryāḥ kathitam tasmāt gāyatryāḥ stotram īraya śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca he jaganmātri bhakta anugraha kāriṇi tvam eva saṃdhyā gāyatrī sāvitrī ca sarasvatī brāhmī ca vaiṣṇavī raudrī raktā śvetā sitetarā brahmā sāyam bhagavatī cityate munibhiḥ sadā haṃsa sthā garuḍa ārūḍhā tathā vṛṣabha vāhinī ṛgveda adhyāyinī bhūmau dṛśyate yā tapasvibhiḥ sā sāma gā api sarveṣu bhrāmyamāṇā tathā bhuvi rudra lokam gatā tvam hi viṣṇu loka nivāsinī saptarṣi prīti jananī māyā vahu vara pradā mad gariṣṭhā ca barāha ca varārohā ca saptamī nīlagaṅgā tathā saṃdhyā sarvadā bhoga mokṣa dā triloka vāhinī devī sthāna traya nivāsinī bhūḥ loka sthā tvam eva asi dharitrī loka dhāriṇī bhuvaḥ loke vāyu śaktiḥ svar loke tejasām nidhiḥ rudra loke sthitā gaurī hara ardha aṅga nivāsinī tvam hi śabalabrahma rūpiṇī tatas parā parā śaktiḥ paramā tvam hi gīyase gaṅgā ca yamunā ca eva vipāśā ca sarasvatī ca iḍā ca piṅgalā ca eva suṣumnā ca tṛtīyakā ca alambusā kuhū ca eva śaṅkhinī prāṇavāhinī nāḍī ca tvam śarīra sthā gīyase prāktanaiḥ budhaḥ hṛd padma sthā prāṇaśaktiḥ kaṇṭha sthā svapnanāyikā tālu sthā tvam sat ādhārā bindu svā bindumālinī mūle tu kuṇḍalī śaktiḥ vyāpinī keśa mūla gā tvam hi śiva agre tu manonmanī iti idam kīrtitam stotram saṃdhyāyām bahu puṇya dam mahā pāpa praśamanam mahā siddhi vidhāyakam yaḥ kīrtayet stotram saṃdhyā kāle samāhitaḥ aputraḥ prāpnuyāt puram dhana arthī dhanam āpnuyāt bhogān bhuktvā ciram kālam te mokṣam avāpnuyāt tapasvibhiḥ kṛtam stotram snāna kāle tu yaḥ paṭhet śṛṇuyāt yaḥ api tad bhaktyā sa tu pāpāt pramucyate pīyūpa sadṛśam vākyam saṃproktam nārada īritam iti śrī devībhāgavate mahāpurāṇe dvādaśa skandhe gāyatrīstotram nāma pañcamaḥ adhyāyaḥ atha ṣaṣṭhaḥ adhyāyaḥ uvāca śruti smṛti purāṇānām rahasyam tvad mukhāt śrutam kena vā brahma vijñānam kim tu vā mokṣa sādhanam brāhmaṇānām gatiḥ kena kena vā mṛtyu nāśanam śrī nārāyaṇaḥ uvāca sādhu sādhu mahā prājña samyak pṛṣṭam tvayā anaghaiḥ śṛṇu vakṣyāmi yatnena gāyatrī aṣṭa sahasrakam nāmnām śubhānām divyānām sarva pāpa vināśanam sṛṣṭi ādau yat bhagavantā pūrvam proktam bravīmi te tad aṣṭottarasahasrasya ṛṣiḥ brahmā prakīrtitaḥ chandaḥ anuṣṭubh tathā devī gāyatrī devatā smṛtā ha laḥ bījāni tasyāḥ ca svarāḥ śaktayaḥ īritāḥ aṅganyāsa karanyāsau ucyete mātṛkā akṣaraiḥ atha dhyānam pravakṣyāmi sādhakānām hitāya vai gāyatrī ūm kamala āsanām kara tala vyānaddha kuṇḍa ambujām padma akṣām ca varatrajam ca dadhatīm haṃsa āvirūḍhām bhaje mātṛmaheśvarī tad amṛta arṇava madhya sthā api ajitā ca aparājitā aṇima ādi guṇa ādhārā api arka maṇḍala saṃsthitā ajarājā aparā agharmā akṣasūtravarā adharā akāra ādi kṣakāra antā api ari ṣaḍvarga bhedinī añjana ādi pratīkāśā api añjanāt vinivāsinī aditiḥ ca ajapā vidyā api aravinda nibha īkṣaṇā tat tat tat ca antar ātmakā antar bahis sthitā vidyā dhvaṃsinī ca antar ātmakā asuraghnī hi amāvāsyā api alakṣmīghnanī antyaja ācitā mahā ādi śaktiḥ ākṛtiḥ śva āyata ānanā āditya padavī cārā api āditya parisevitā nivāsinī hi pratyaya ādhārā ca ākāśa anta nivāsinī ādya akṣara samāyuktā ca antar ākāśa rūpiṇī maṇḍala gatā ca antara vyānta nāśinī ca irāvatī ca indrapadā candrāṇī ca indurūpiṇī ca iṣu saṃdhāna kāriṇī indranīla sama ākārā ca iḍā piṅgala rūpiṇī indrākṣī ca īśvarā ca iha ātraya vivarjitā umā ca upā hi uḍu nibhā urvāruka phala ānanā ca uḍuprabhā ca uḍumatī hacuḍupā hacuḍumadhyagā ūrdhvam ca api ūrdhvakeśī ca api ūrdhva adhas gati bhedinī bāhupriyā ca ūrmimālā vāggranthadāyinī ṛtam pitumatī ṛṣi deva namaskṛtā ṛgvedāḥ ṛṇa hartrī ca ṛṣi maṇḍala vāriṇī dhī dā ṛju mārga sthā ṛju dharmā ṛju pradā lūtāri vara sambhūtā lūtā ādi vihāriṇī eka akṣarā ca eka mātrā ca ekā ca eka eka niṣṭhitā aindrī rāvata ārūḍhā ca aihika āmuṣmika pradā aṇḍa madhya sthitā devī ca ākāram anurūpiṇī tātyāyanī kālarātriḥ kāmākṣī kāmasundarī kaumārī karuṇā apāṅgī kakubantā karipriyā pālindī kālikā kāñcī kalaśa udbhava saṃstutā kāma mātā kratumatī kāmarūpā kaikeyī kokila ālāpā ketakī kusuma priyā paṇḍalu dharā kālī karma nirmūla kāriṇī kalahaṃsa gatiḥ kakṣā kṛta kautukamaṅgalā bhūṭasthā kuvarā kamrā kukṣisthā akhilaviṣṭapā khaṅgakheṭakarā kharvā khecarī khagavāhanā khaṭvāṅga dhāriṇī khyātā khaga rāja upari sthitā tad ghnī khaṇḍita jarā khaṇḍa ākhyāna pradāyinī khaṇḍa indu tilakā gaṅgā gaṇeśa guha pūjitā gāyatrī gomatī gītā gāndhārī gāna lolupā girijā guhya mātaṃgī garuḍadhvaja vallabhā gokarṇa nilaya āsaktā gṛhya maṇḍala vartinī dharmadā dhanadā ghaṇṭā dhora dānava madanā ghṛṇi mantra mayī ghopā dhana sampatti dāyinī yāna dhātu mayā carcā carcitā cāru hāsinī caṭulā caṇḍikā citrā citra mālya vibhūṣitā catur bhujā cāru dantā cāturā carita pradā cūlikā citra vastra antā candramaḥ karṇa kuṇḍalā candrahāsā cārudātrī cakorī candrahāsinī candrikā candradhātrī ca caurī caurā ca caṇḍikā cañcat vāgvādinī candracūḍā cora vināśinī cāru candana lipta aṅgā cañcat cāmara vījitā cāru madhyā cāru gatiḥ candrikā candra rūpiṇī cāruhomapriyā cāru ācaritā cakrabāhukā candra maṇḍala madhya sthā candra maṇḍala darpaṇā cakravākastanī ceṣṭā citrā cāruvilāsinī codayitrī cira prajñā cātakā cāru hetukā chatramatā chattradharā chāyāchandaḥ paricchadā chandaḥ nuṣṭubh pratiṣṭhā antā chidra upadrava bhedinī māhnavī
